Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.

Notation "_ ^op" was already used in scope cat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Examples.Arrow.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Examples.Three.

New coercion path [fact_functor;
                   functor_data_from_functor;
                   functor_on_objects] : functorial_factorization >-> Funclass is ambiguous with existing 
[fact_section; section_disp_on_objects] : functorial_factorization >-> Funclass.
[ambiguous-paths,coercions,default]

Require Import UniMath.ModelCategories.Helpers.
Require Import UniMath.ModelCategories.Generated.LNWFSHelpers.
Require Import UniMath.ModelCategories.Generated.FFMonoidalStructure.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section Ff_cocomplete.

Context {C : category}.
Context (CC : Colims C).

Section Ff_cocomplete_diagram.

Context {g : graph} (d : diagram g (Ff C)).
Context (H : is_connected g).

(* diagram of middle objects *)

g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
a: arrow C
diagram g C

g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)

a: arrow C
(λ f : vertex g → C,
 ∏ a b : vertex g, edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧) ?pr1

a: arrow C
vertex g → C
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
a: arrow C
v: vertex g
C

    exact (pr1 (pr1 (dob d v) a)).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
a: arrow C
(λ f : vertex g → C,
 ∏ a b : vertex g, edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
  (λ v : vertex g, pr1 (pr1 (dob d v) a))
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
a: arrow C
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
C ⟦ pr1 (pr1 (dob d u) a), pr1 (pr1 (dob d v) a) ⟧

    exact (pr1 (pr1 (dmor d e) a)).
Defined.

Definition CCFf_pt_ob1 : ∏ (a : arrow C), ColimCocone (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 a) :=
    λ a, CC _ _.



C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
f: arrow C
cocone (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 f) (arrow_cod f)

CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
f: arrow C
cocone (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 f) (arrow_cod f)

CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
f: arrow C
∏ v : vertex g,
C ⟦ dob (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 f) v, arrow_cod f ⟧
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
f: arrow C
forms_cocone (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 f) ?f

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
f: arrow C
∏ v : vertex g,
C ⟦ dob (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 f) v, arrow_cod f ⟧
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
C ⟦ dob (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 f) v, arrow_cod f ⟧

    exact (fact_R (dob d v) f).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
f: arrow C
forms_cocone (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 f)
  (λ v : vertex g, three_mor12 (dob d v f))
 abstract (
      intros u v e;
      set (ecommf := pr2 (three_mor_comm (section_nat_trans (dmor d e) f)));
      etrans; [exact (pathsinv0 ecommf)|];
      apply id_right
    ).
Defined.

(* this construction only works for non-empty graphs, since
   we need an arrow arrow_dom a --> colim (CCFf_pt_ob1 a),
   but we can only find this for a non-empty graph *)

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a: arrow C
three_disp C a


C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a: arrow C
three_disp C a

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a: arrow C
∑ (xz : C ⟦ arrow_dom a, colim (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) ⟧)
(zy : C ⟦ colim (CCFf_pt_ob1 a), arrow_cod a ⟧),
xz · zy = a

d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a: arrow C
∑ zy : C ⟦ colim (CCFf_pt_ob1 a), arrow_cod a ⟧,
pr12 (pr1 (dob d v0) a) · colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) v0
· zy = a

 pr12 (pr1 (dob d v0) a) · colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) v0
 · zy = a) ?pr1

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a: arrow C
cocone (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 a) (arrow_cod a)

    exact (Ff_cocone_pointwise_R a).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a: arrow C
(λ zy : C ⟦ colim (CCFf_pt_ob1 a), arrow_cod a ⟧,
 pr12 (pr1 (dob d v0) a) · colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) v0
 · zy = a)
  (colimArrow (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) (arrow_cod a)
     (Ff_cocone_pointwise_R a))

    abstract (
      etrans; [apply assoc'|];
      etrans; [apply cancel_precomposition;
              use (colimArrowCommutes (CCFf_pt_ob1 a))|];
      (* cbn. *)
      exact (three_comp (fact_functor (dob d v0) a))
    ).
Defined.

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a, b: arrow C
f: arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
(λ f0 : C ⟦ pr1 (ColimFf_ob v0 a),
        pr1 (ColimFf_ob v0 b) ⟧,
 pr12 (ColimFf_ob v0 a) · f0 =
 pr11 f · pr12 (ColimFf_ob v0 b)
 × pr122 (ColimFf_ob v0 a) · pr21 f =
   f0 · pr122 (ColimFf_ob v0 b)) ?pr1

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a, b: arrow C
f: arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
v: vertex g
Dv:= dob d v: Ff C
C ⟦ dob (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 a) v,
dob (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 b) v ⟧

      exact (pr1 ((section_disp_on_morphisms (section_disp_data_from_section_disp Dv)) f)).
    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a, b: arrow C
f: arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
∏ (u v : vertex g) (e : edge u v),
dmor (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 a) e
· (λ v0 : vertex g,
   let Dv := dob d v0 in
   pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv f)) v =
(λ v0 : vertex g,
 let Dv := dob d v0 in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv f)) u
· dmor (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 b) e
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a, b: arrow C
f: arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
dmor (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 a) e
· (λ v : vertex g,
   let Dv := dob d v in
   pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv f)) v =
(λ v : vertex g,
 let Dv := dob d v in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv f)) u
· dmor (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 b) e

      (* cbn. *)
      abstract (
        set (De := (dmor d e));
        set (Deax := section_nt_disp_axioms_from_section_nt_disp De _ _ f);
        etrans; [exact (pathsinv0 (base_paths _ _ Deax))|];
        etrans; [apply pr1_transportf_const|];
        reflexivity
      ).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a, b: arrow C
f: arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
(λ f0 : C ⟦ pr1 (ColimFf_ob v0 a),
        pr1 (ColimFf_ob v0 b) ⟧,
 pr12 (ColimFf_ob v0 a) · f0 =
 pr11 f · pr12 (ColimFf_ob v0 b)
 × pr122 (ColimFf_ob v0 a) · pr21 f =
   f0 · pr122 (ColimFf_ob v0 b))
  (colimOfArrows (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) (CCFf_pt_ob1 b)
     (λ v : vertex g,
      let Dv := dob d v in
      pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv f))
     (λ (u v : vertex g) (e : edge u v),
      ColimFf_mor_subproof a b f u v e))

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a, b: arrow C
f: arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
pr12 (ColimFf_ob v0 a)
· colimOfArrows (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) (CCFf_pt_ob1 b)
    (λ v : vertex g,
     let Dv := dob d v in
     pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv f))
    (λ (u v : vertex g) (e : edge u v),
     ColimFf_mor_subproof a b f u v e) =
pr11 f · pr12 (ColimFf_ob v0 b)
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a, b: arrow C
f: arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
pr122 (ColimFf_ob v0 a) · pr21 f =
colimOfArrows (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) (CCFf_pt_ob1 b)
  (λ v : vertex g,
   let Dv := dob d v in
   pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv f))
  (λ (u v : vertex g) (e : edge u v),
   ColimFf_mor_subproof a b f u v e)
· pr122 (ColimFf_ob v0 b)

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a, b: arrow C
f: arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
pr12 (ColimFf_ob v0 a)
· colimOfArrows (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) (CCFf_pt_ob1 b)
    (λ v : vertex g,
     let Dv := dob d v in
     pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv f))
    (λ (u v : vertex g) (e : edge u v),
     ColimFf_mor_subproof a b f u v e) =
pr11 f · pr12 (ColimFf_ob v0 b)

      abstract (
        set (Dv0f := ((section_disp_on_morphisms (section_disp_data_from_section_disp (dob d v0))) f));
        set (Dv0fax := pr2 Dv0f);
        etrans; [apply assoc'|];
        etrans; [apply cancel_precomposition;
                 use (colimArrowCommutes (CCFf_pt_ob1 a))|];

        etrans; [apply assoc|];
        apply pathsinv0;
        etrans; [apply assoc|];
        apply cancel_postcomposition;
        exact (pathsinv0 (pr1 Dv0fax))
      ).
    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a, b: arrow C
f: arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
pr122 (ColimFf_ob v0 a) · pr21 f =
colimOfArrows (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) (CCFf_pt_ob1 b)
  (λ v : vertex g,
   let Dv := dob d v in
   pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv f))
  (λ (u v : vertex g) (e : edge u v),
   ColimFf_mor_subproof a b f u v e)
· pr122 (ColimFf_ob v0 b)


      abstract (
        etrans; [use postcompWithColimArrow|];
        apply pathsinv0;
        etrans; [use precompWithColimOfArrows|];
        apply maponpaths;
        use cocone_paths;
        intro v;
        (* cbn. *)
        set (Dvf := ((section_disp_on_morphisms (section_disp_data_from_section_disp (dob d v))) f));
        set (Dvfax := pr2 Dvf);

        exact (pathsinv0 (pr2 Dvfax))
      ).
Defined.

Definition ColimFf_data (v0 : vertex g) : section_disp_data (three_disp C) :=
    (_,, @ColimFf_mor v0).


C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
section_disp_axioms (ColimFf_data v0)


C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
section_disp_axioms (ColimFf_data v0)

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
∏ x : arrow C,
section_disp_on_morphisms (ColimFf_data v0)
  (identity x) = id_disp (ColimFf_data v0 x)
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
∏ (x y z : arrow C) (f : arrow C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : arrow C ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms (ColimFf_data v0) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (ColimFf_data v0) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms (ColimFf_data v0) g)%mor_disp

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
∏ x : arrow C,
section_disp_on_morphisms (ColimFf_data v0)
  (identity x) = id_disp (ColimFf_data v0 x)

pr1

     (identity a)) = pr1 (id_disp (ColimFf_data v0 a))

· pr1

       (identity a)) = colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) u

    (* cbn. *)

· colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) u =

    apply id_left.
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
∏ (x y z : arrow C) (f : arrow C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : arrow C ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms (ColimFf_data v0) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (ColimFf_data v0) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms (ColimFf_data v0) g)%mor_disp
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a, b, c: arrow C
fab: arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
fbc: arrow C ⟦ b, c ⟧
section_disp_on_morphisms (ColimFf_data v0)
  (fab · fbc) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (ColimFf_data v0) fab ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms (ColimFf_data v0) fbc)%mor_disp

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a, b, c: arrow C
fab: arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
fbc: arrow C ⟦ b, c ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (ColimFf_data v0)
     (fab · fbc)) =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (ColimFf_data v0) fab ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms (ColimFf_data v0) fbc)%mor_disp

    (* cbn. *)
    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a, b, c: arrow C
fab: arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
fbc: arrow C ⟦ b, c ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (ColimFf_data v0) fab ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms (ColimFf_data v0) fbc)%mor_disp =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (ColimFf_data v0)
     (fab · fbc))

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a, b, c: arrow C
fab: arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
fbc: arrow C ⟦ b, c ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (ColimFf_data v0) fab ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms (ColimFf_data v0) fbc)%mor_disp =
?b
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a, b, c: arrow C
fab: arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
fbc: arrow C ⟦ b, c ⟧
?b =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (ColimFf_data v0)
     (fab · fbc))
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a, b, c: arrow C
fab: arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
fbc: arrow C ⟦ b, c ⟧
colimArrow (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) (colim (CCFf_pt_ob1 c))
  (make_cocone
     (λ u : vertex g,
      (λ v : vertex g,
       let Dv := dob d v in
       pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fab)) u
      · coconeIn
          (make_cocone
             (λ u0 : vertex g,
              (λ v : vertex g,
               let Dv := dob d v in
               pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc))
                u0 · colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 c) u0)
             (colimOfArrows_subproof C g
                (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 b)
                (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 c)
                (CCFf_pt_ob1 c)
                (λ v : vertex g,
                 let Dv := dob d v in
                 pr1
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc))
                (λ (u0 v : vertex g) (e : edge u0 v),
                 ColimFf_mor_subproof b c fbc u0 v e)))
          u)
     (preCompWithColimOfArrows_subproof
        (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) (CCFf_pt_ob1 b)
        (λ v : vertex g,
         let Dv := dob d v in
         pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fab))
        (λ (u v : vertex g) (e : edge u v),
         ColimFf_mor_subproof a b fab u v e)
        (colim (CCFf_pt_ob1 c))
        (make_cocone
           (λ u : vertex g,
            (λ v : vertex g,
             let Dv := dob d v in
             pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc)) u
            · colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 c) u)
           (colimOfArrows_subproof C g
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 b)
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 c)
              (CCFf_pt_ob1 c)
              (λ v : vertex g,
               let Dv := dob d v in
               pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc))
              (λ (u v : vertex g) (e : edge u v),
               ColimFf_mor_subproof b c fbc u v e))))) =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (ColimFf_data v0)
     (fab · fbc))

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a, b, c: arrow C
fab: arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
fbc: arrow C ⟦ b, c ⟧
∏ u : vertex g,
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) u
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms (ColimFf_data v0)
       (fab · fbc)) =
coconeIn
  (make_cocone
     (λ u0 : vertex g,
      (let Dv := dob d u0 in
       pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fab))
      · coconeIn
          (make_cocone
             (λ u1 : vertex g,
              (let Dv := dob d u1 in
               pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc))
              · colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 c) u1)
             (colimOfArrows_subproof C g
                (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 b)
                (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 c)
                (CCFf_pt_ob1 c)
                (λ v : vertex g,
                 let Dv := dob d v in
                 pr1
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc))
                (λ (u1 v : vertex g) (e : edge u1 v),
                 ColimFf_mor_subproof b c fbc u1 v e)))
          u0)
     (preCompWithColimOfArrows_subproof
        (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) (CCFf_pt_ob1 b)
        (λ v : vertex g,
         let Dv := dob d v in
         pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fab))
        (λ (u0 v : vertex g) (e : edge u0 v),
         ColimFf_mor_subproof a b fab u0 v e)
        (colim (CCFf_pt_ob1 c))
        (make_cocone
           (λ u0 : vertex g,
            (let Dv := dob d u0 in
             pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc))
            · colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 c) u0)
           (colimOfArrows_subproof C g
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 b)
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 c)
              (CCFf_pt_ob1 c)
              (λ v : vertex g,
               let Dv := dob d v in
               pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc))
              (λ (u0 v : vertex g) (e : edge u0 v),
               ColimFf_mor_subproof b c fbc u0 v e)))))
  u

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a, b, c: arrow C
fab: arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
fbc: arrow C ⟦ b, c ⟧
u: vertex g
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) u
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms (ColimFf_data v0)
       (fab · fbc)) =
coconeIn
  (make_cocone
     (λ u : vertex g,
      (let Dv := dob d u in
       pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fab))
      · coconeIn
          (make_cocone
             (λ u0 : vertex g,
              (let Dv := dob d u0 in
               pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc))
              · colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 c) u0)
             (colimOfArrows_subproof C g
                (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 b)
                (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 c)
                (CCFf_pt_ob1 c)
                (λ v : vertex g,
                 let Dv := dob d v in
                 pr1
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc))
                (λ (u0 v : vertex g) (e : edge u0 v),
                 ColimFf_mor_subproof b c fbc u0 v e)))
          u)
     (preCompWithColimOfArrows_subproof
        (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) (CCFf_pt_ob1 b)
        (λ v : vertex g,
         let Dv := dob d v in
         pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fab))
        (λ (u v : vertex g) (e : edge u v),
         ColimFf_mor_subproof a b fab u v e)
        (colim (CCFf_pt_ob1 c))
        (make_cocone
           (λ u : vertex g,
            (let Dv := dob d u in
             pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc))
            · colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 c) u)
           (colimOfArrows_subproof C g
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 b)
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 c)
              (CCFf_pt_ob1 c)
              (λ v : vertex g,
               let Dv := dob d v in
               pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc))
              (λ (u v : vertex g) (e : edge u v),
               ColimFf_mor_subproof b c fbc u v e)))))
  u

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a, b, c: arrow C
fab: arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
fbc: arrow C ⟦ b, c ⟧
u: vertex g
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) u
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms (ColimFf_data v0)
       (fab · fbc)) = ?b
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a, b, c: arrow C
fab: arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
fbc: arrow C ⟦ b, c ⟧
u: vertex g
?b =
coconeIn
  (make_cocone
     (λ u : vertex g,
      (let Dv := dob d u in
       pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fab))
      · coconeIn
          (make_cocone
             (λ u0 : vertex g,
              (let Dv := dob d u0 in
               pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc))
              · colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 c) u0)
             (colimOfArrows_subproof C g
                (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 b)
                (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 c)
                (CCFf_pt_ob1 c)
                (λ v : vertex g,
                 let Dv := dob d v in
                 pr1
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc))
                (λ (u0 v : vertex g) (e : edge u0 v),
                 ColimFf_mor_subproof b c fbc u0 v e)))
          u)
     (preCompWithColimOfArrows_subproof
        (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) (CCFf_pt_ob1 b)
        (λ v : vertex g,
         let Dv := dob d v in
         pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fab))
        (λ (u v : vertex g) (e : edge u v),
         ColimFf_mor_subproof a b fab u v e)
        (colim (CCFf_pt_ob1 c))
        (make_cocone
           (λ u : vertex g,
            (let Dv := dob d u in
             pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc))
            · colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 c) u)
           (colimOfArrows_subproof C g
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 b)
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 c)
              (CCFf_pt_ob1 c)
              (λ v : vertex g,
               let Dv := dob d v in
               pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc))
              (λ (u v : vertex g) (e : edge u v),
               ColimFf_mor_subproof b c fbc u v e)))))
  u
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a, b, c: arrow C
fab: arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
fbc: arrow C ⟦ b, c ⟧
u: vertex g
(λ v : vertex g,
 let Dv := dob d v in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv (fab · fbc))) u
· colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 c) u =
coconeIn
  (make_cocone
     (λ u : vertex g,
      (let Dv := dob d u in
       pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fab))
      · coconeIn
          (make_cocone
             (λ u0 : vertex g,
              (let Dv := dob d u0 in
               pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc))
              · colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 c) u0)
             (colimOfArrows_subproof C g
                (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 b)
                (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 c)
                (CCFf_pt_ob1 c)
                (λ v : vertex g,
                 let Dv := dob d v in
                 pr1
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc))
                (λ (u0 v : vertex g) (e : edge u0 v),
                 ColimFf_mor_subproof b c fbc u0 v e)))
          u)
     (preCompWithColimOfArrows_subproof
        (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) (CCFf_pt_ob1 b)
        (λ v : vertex g,
         let Dv := dob d v in
         pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fab))
        (λ (u v : vertex g) (e : edge u v),
         ColimFf_mor_subproof a b fab u v e)
        (colim (CCFf_pt_ob1 c))
        (make_cocone
           (λ u : vertex g,
            (let Dv := dob d u in
             pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc))
            · colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 c) u)
           (colimOfArrows_subproof C g
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 b)
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 c)
              (CCFf_pt_ob1 c)
              (λ v : vertex g,
               let Dv := dob d v in
               pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc))
              (λ (u v : vertex g) (e : edge u v),
               ColimFf_mor_subproof b c fbc u v e)))))
  u


    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a, b, c: arrow C
fab: arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
fbc: arrow C ⟦ b, c ⟧
u: vertex g
coconeIn
  (make_cocone
     (λ u : vertex g,
      (let Dv := dob d u in
       pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fab))
      · coconeIn
          (make_cocone
             (λ u0 : vertex g,
              (let Dv := dob d u0 in
               pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc))
              · colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 c) u0)
             (colimOfArrows_subproof C g
                (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 b)
                (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 c)
                (CCFf_pt_ob1 c)
                (λ v : vertex g,
                 let Dv := dob d v in
                 pr1
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc))
                (λ (u0 v : vertex g) (e : edge u0 v),
                 ColimFf_mor_subproof b c fbc u0 v e)))
          u)
     (preCompWithColimOfArrows_subproof
        (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) (CCFf_pt_ob1 b)
        (λ v : vertex g,
         let Dv := dob d v in
         pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fab))
        (λ (u v : vertex g) (e : edge u v),
         ColimFf_mor_subproof a b fab u v e)
        (colim (CCFf_pt_ob1 c))
        (make_cocone
           (λ u : vertex g,
            (let Dv := dob d u in
             pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc))
            · colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 c) u)
           (colimOfArrows_subproof C g
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 b)
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 c)
              (CCFf_pt_ob1 c)
              (λ v : vertex g,
               let Dv := dob d v in
               pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc))
              (λ (u v : vertex g) (e : edge u v),
               ColimFf_mor_subproof b c fbc u v e)))))
  u =
(let Dv := dob d u in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv (fab · fbc)))
· colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 c) u

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a, b, c: arrow C
fab: arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
fbc: arrow C ⟦ b, c ⟧
u: vertex g
coconeIn
  (make_cocone
     (λ u : vertex g,
      (let Dv := dob d u in
       pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fab))
      · coconeIn
          (make_cocone
             (λ u0 : vertex g,
              (let Dv := dob d u0 in
               pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc))
              · colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 c) u0)
             (colimOfArrows_subproof C g
                (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 b)
                (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 c)
                (CCFf_pt_ob1 c)
                (λ v : vertex g,
                 let Dv := dob d v in
                 pr1
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc))
                (λ (u0 v : vertex g) (e : edge u0 v),
                 ColimFf_mor_subproof b c fbc u0 v e)))
          u)
     (preCompWithColimOfArrows_subproof
        (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) (CCFf_pt_ob1 b)
        (λ v : vertex g,
         let Dv := dob d v in
         pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fab))
        (λ (u v : vertex g) (e : edge u v),
         ColimFf_mor_subproof a b fab u v e)
        (colim (CCFf_pt_ob1 c))
        (make_cocone
           (λ u : vertex g,
            (let Dv := dob d u in
             pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc))
            · colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 c) u)
           (colimOfArrows_subproof C g
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 b)
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 c)
              (CCFf_pt_ob1 c)
              (λ v : vertex g,
               let Dv := dob d v in
               pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc))
              (λ (u v : vertex g) (e : edge u v),
               ColimFf_mor_subproof b c fbc u v e)))))
  u = ?b
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a, b, c: arrow C
fab: arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
fbc: arrow C ⟦ b, c ⟧
u: vertex g
?b =
(let Dv := dob d u in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv (fab · fbc)))
· colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 c) u
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a, b, c: arrow C
fab: arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
fbc: arrow C ⟦ b, c ⟧
u: vertex g
(let Dv := dob d u in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fab))
· (let Dv := dob d u in
   pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc))
· colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 c) u =
(let Dv := dob d u in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv (fab · fbc)))
· colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 c) u

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a, b, c: arrow C
fab: arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
fbc: arrow C ⟦ b, c ⟧
u: vertex g
(let Dv := dob d u in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fab))
· (let Dv := dob d u in
   pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc)) =
(let Dv := dob d u in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv (fab · fbc)))


    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a, b, c: arrow C
fab: arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
fbc: arrow C ⟦ b, c ⟧
u: vertex g
(let Dv := dob d u in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fab))
· (let Dv := dob d u in
   pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv fbc)) = ?b
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a, b, c: arrow C
fab: arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
fbc: arrow C ⟦ b, c ⟧
u: vertex g
?b =
(let Dv := dob d u in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv (fab · fbc)))
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
a, b, c: arrow C
fab: arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
fbc: arrow C ⟦ b, c ⟧
u: vertex g
pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms (dob d u) (fab · fbc)) =
(let Dv := dob d u in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv (fab · fbc)))

    reflexivity.
Qed.

Definition ColimFf (v0 : vertex g) : Ff C :=
    (_,, ColimFf_axioms v0).


(* we need an edge from v0 to v for this to work,
   regarding equality of (arrow_dom v/v0 · colimIn v/v0) *)

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0, v: vertex g
Ff C ⟦ dob d v, ColimFf v0 ⟧


C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0, v: vertex g
Ff C ⟦ dob d v, ColimFf v0 ⟧

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0, v: vertex g
section_nat_trans_disp_data (dob d v) (ColimFf v0)
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0, v: vertex g
(λ nt : section_nat_trans_disp_data (dob d v)
          (ColimFf v0),
 section_nat_trans_disp_axioms nt) ?pr1

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0, v: vertex g
section_nat_trans_disp_data (dob d v) (ColimFf v0)
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0, v: vertex g
a: arrow C
dob d v a -->[ identity a] ColimFf v0 a

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0, v: vertex g
a: arrow C
pr12 (dob d v a) · colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) v =
pr11 (identity a) · pr12 (ColimFf v0 a)
× pr122 (dob d v a) · pr21 (identity a) =
  colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) v · pr122 (ColimFf v0 a)

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0, v: vertex g
a: arrow C
pr12 (dob d v a) · colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) v =
pr11 (identity a) · pr12 (ColimFf v0 a)
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0, v: vertex g
a: arrow C
pr122 (dob d v a) · pr21 (identity a) =
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) v · pr122 (ColimFf v0 a)

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0, v: vertex g
a: arrow C
pr12 (dob d v a) · colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) v =
pr11 (identity a) · pr12 (ColimFf v0 a)

      (* cbn. *)
      abstract (
        apply pathsinv0;
        etrans; [apply id_left|];
        set (predicate := λ v, pr12 (pr1 (ColimFf v0) a) = pr12 (pr1 (dob d v) a) · colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) v);
        use (connected_graph_zig_zag_strong_induction v0 H predicate); [reflexivity|];
        intros u u' Hu uu';
        induction uu' as [e|e]; (etrans; [exact Hu|]);
          [|apply pathsinv0];
          (etrans; [apply cancel_precomposition;
                 exact (pathsinv0 (colimInCommutes (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) _ _ e))|];
           etrans; [apply assoc|];
           apply cancel_postcomposition;
           etrans; [exact (pr12 (pr1 (dmor d e) a))|];
           apply id_left)
      ).
    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0, v: vertex g
a: arrow C
pr122 (dob d v a) · pr21 (identity a) =
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) v · pr122 (ColimFf v0 a)
 abstract (
        etrans; [apply id_right|];
        apply pathsinv0;
        etrans; [apply (colimArrowCommutes (CCFf_pt_ob1 a))|];
        reflexivity
      ).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0, v: vertex g
(λ nt : section_nat_trans_disp_data (dob d v)
          (ColimFf v0),
 section_nat_trans_disp_axioms nt)
  ((λ a : arrow C,
    colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) v,,
    colim_nat_trans_in_data_subproof v0 v a,,
    colim_nat_trans_in_data_subproof0 v0 v a)
   :
   section_nat_trans_disp_data (dob d v) (ColimFf v0))
 abstract (
      intros a b f;
      apply subtypePath; [intro; apply isapropdirprod; apply homset_property|];
      etrans; [use pr1_transportf_const|];
      apply pathsinv0;
      (* cbn. *)
      etrans; [apply (colimOfArrowsIn _ _ (CCFf_pt_ob1 a))|];
      reflexivity
    ).
Defined.


C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph

H: is_connected g
F: Ff C
cc: cocone d F
a: arrow C
cocone (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 a) (pr1 (pr1 F a))

⟧

CC: Colims C

H: is_connected g
F: Ff C
cc: cocone d F
a: arrow C
∏ v : vertex g,

⟧
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
F: Ff C
cc: cocone d F
a: arrow C
v: vertex g
C ⟦ dob (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 a) v, pr1 (pr1 F a)
⟧

    exact (pr1 (pr1 (coconeIn cc v) a)).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
F: Ff C
cc: cocone d F
a: arrow C
forms_cocone (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 a)
  (λ v : vertex g, pr1 (pr1 (coconeIn cc v) a))
 abstract (
      intros u v e;
      (* cbn. *)
      set (cccomm_pointwise := eq_section_nat_trans_disp_on_morphism (coconeInCommutes cc _ _ e) a);
      apply pathsinv0;
      etrans; [exact (pathsinv0 (base_paths _ _ cccomm_pointwise))|];
      etrans; [use pr1_transportf_const|];
      reflexivity
    ).
Defined.

g: graph

H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
F: Ff C
cc: cocone d F
Ff C ⟦ ColimFf v0, F ⟧

g: graph

v0: vertex g
F: Ff C
cc: cocone d F
Ff C ⟦ ColimFf v0, F ⟧

g: graph

cc: cocone d F
(λ nt : section_nat_trans_disp_data (ColimFf v0) F,
 section_nat_trans_disp_axioms nt) ?pr1

CC: Colims C
g: graph

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
F: Ff C
cc: cocone d F
a: arrow C
ColimFf v0 a -->[ identity a] F a

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
F: Ff C
cc: cocone d F
a: arrow C
pr12 (ColimFf v0 a)
· colimArrow (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) (pr1 (pr1 F a))
    (cocone_pointwise F cc a) =
pr11 (identity a) · pr12 (F a)
× pr122 (ColimFf v0 a) · pr21 (identity a) =
  colimArrow (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) (pr1 (pr1 F a))
    (cocone_pointwise F cc a) · pr122 (F a)

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
F: Ff C
cc: cocone d F
a: arrow C
pr12 (ColimFf v0 a)
· colimArrow (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) (pr1 (pr1 F a))
    (cocone_pointwise F cc a) =
pr11 (identity a) · pr12 (F a)
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
F: Ff C
cc: cocone d F
a: arrow C
pr122 (ColimFf v0 a) · pr21 (identity a) =
colimArrow (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) (pr1 (pr1 F a))
  (cocone_pointwise F cc a) · pr122 (F a)

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
F: Ff C
cc: cocone d F
a: arrow C
pr12 (ColimFf v0 a)
· colimArrow (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) (pr1 (pr1 F a))
    (cocone_pointwise F cc a) =
pr11 (identity a) · pr12 (F a)
 abstract (
        (* cbn. *)
        etrans; [apply assoc'|];
        etrans; [apply cancel_precomposition;
                 apply (colimArrowCommutes (CCFf_pt_ob1 a))|];
        apply pathsinv0;
        etrans; [apply id_left|];
        apply pathsinv0;
        (* cbn. *)
        etrans; [exact (pr12 (pr1 (coconeIn cc v0) a))|];
        apply id_left
      ).
    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
F: Ff C
cc: cocone d F
a: arrow C
pr122 (ColimFf v0 a) · pr21 (identity a) =
colimArrow (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) (pr1 (pr1 F a))
  (cocone_pointwise F cc a) · pr122 (F a)
 abstract (
        etrans; [apply id_right|];
        apply pathsinv0;
        etrans; [apply postcompWithColimArrow|];
        use colimArrowUnique;
        intro u;
        etrans; [apply colimArrowCommutes|];
        (* naturality of coconeIn cc at u *)
        etrans; [exact (pathsinv0 (pr22 (pr1 (coconeIn cc u) a)))|];
        apply id_right
      ).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
F: Ff C
cc: cocone d F
(λ nt : section_nat_trans_disp_data (ColimFf v0) F,
 section_nat_trans_disp_axioms nt)
  ((λ a : arrow C,
    colimArrow (CCFf_pt_ob1 a) (pr1 (pr1 F a))
      (cocone_pointwise F cc a),,
    ColimFf_unique_mor_subproof v0 F cc a,,
    ColimFf_unique_mor_subproof0 v0 F cc a)
   :
   section_nat_trans_disp_data (ColimFf v0) F)
 abstract (
      intros a b f;
      apply subtypePath; [intro; apply isapropdirprod; apply homset_property|];
      etrans; [use pr1_transportf_const|];
      etrans; [apply precompWithColimOfArrows|];
      apply pathsinv0;
      etrans; [apply postcompWithColimArrow|];

      use colimArrowUnique;
      intro u;
      etrans; [apply (colimArrowCommutes (CCFf_pt_ob1 a))|];
      (* cbn. *)

      set (ccuf := (section_nt_disp_axioms_from_section_nt_disp (coconeIn cc u)) _ _ f);
      etrans; [exact (pathsinv0 (base_paths _ _ ccuf))|];
      etrans; [use pr1_transportf_const|];
      reflexivity
    ).
Defined.


C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
F: Ff C
cc: cocone d F
∃! x : Ff C ⟦ ColimFf v0, F ⟧,
∏ v : vertex g,
colim_nat_trans_in_data · x = coconeIn cc v

(λ t : Ff C ⟦ ColimFf v0, F ⟧,
 ∏ v : vertex g,
 colim_nat_trans_in_data · t = coconeIn cc v) ?x
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
F: Ff C
cc: cocone d F
∏ y : Ff C ⟦ ColimFf v0, F ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : Ff C ⟦ ColimFf v0, F ⟧,
    ∏ v : vertex g,
    colim_nat_trans_in_data · t = coconeIn cc v) y)
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
F: Ff C
cc: cocone d F
∏ y : Ff C ⟦ ColimFf v0, F ⟧,
(λ t : Ff C ⟦ ColimFf v0, F ⟧,
 ∏ v : vertex g,
 colim_nat_trans_in_data · t = coconeIn cc v) y
→ y = ?x

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
F: Ff C
cc: cocone d F
Ff C ⟦ ColimFf v0, F ⟧
 exact (ColimFf_unique_mor v0 F cc).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
F: Ff C
cc: cocone d F
(λ t : Ff C ⟦ ColimFf v0, F ⟧,
 ∏ v : vertex g,
 colim_nat_trans_in_data · t = coconeIn cc v)
  (ColimFf_unique_mor v0 F cc)
 abstract (
      intro v;
      functorial_factorization_mor_eq a;
      etrans; [use pr1_transportf_const|];
      etrans; [apply (colimArrowCommutes (CCFf_pt_ob1 a))|];
      reflexivity
    ).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
F: Ff C
cc: cocone d F
∏ y : Ff C ⟦ ColimFf v0, F ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : Ff C ⟦ ColimFf v0, F ⟧,
    ∏ v : vertex g,
    colim_nat_trans_in_data · t = coconeIn cc v) y)
 abstract (
      intro; apply impred; intro; apply homset_property
    ).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
F: Ff C
cc: cocone d F
∏ y : Ff C ⟦ ColimFf v0, F ⟧,
(λ t : Ff C ⟦ ColimFf v0, F ⟧,
 ∏ v : vertex g,
 colim_nat_trans_in_data · t = coconeIn cc v) y
→ y = ColimFf_unique_mor v0 F cc
 abstract (
      intros f t;
      functorial_factorization_mor_eq a;
      apply colimArrowUnique;
      intro u;
      (* cbn. *)
      set (tax := eq_section_nat_trans_disp_on_morphism (t u) a);
      apply pathsinv0;
      etrans; [exact (pathsinv0 (base_paths _ _ tax))|];
      etrans; [use pr1_transportf_const|];
      reflexivity
    ).
Defined.

  (λ v : vertex g, colim_nat_trans_in_data)
 abstract (
        intros u v e;
        functorial_factorization_mor_eq a;
        etrans; [use pr1_transportf_const|];
        (* cbn. *)
        apply (colimInCommutes (CCFf_pt_ob1 a))

g: graph
d: diagram g (Ff C)
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
isColimCocone d (ColimFf v0)
  (make_cocone
     (λ v : vertex g, colim_nat_trans_in_data)
     (ColimFfCocone_subproof v0))
 intros F cc; exact (ColimFf_unique _ cc).
Defined.

Section LNWFS_cocomplete.

Context {C : category}.
Context (CC : Colims C).

Context {g : graph} (d : diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))).
Context (H : is_connected g).
Context (v0 : vertex g).
Context (FfCC := λ d, ColimFfCocone CC d H v0).


Local Definition lnwfs_Σ {F : Ff C} (L : lnwfs_over F) := pr1 L.


C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
a: arrow C
diagram g (arrow C)


C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
a: arrow C
diagram g (arrow C)

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
a: arrow C
vertex g → arrow C
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
a: arrow C
(λ f : vertex g → arrow C,
 ∏ a b : vertex g, edge a b → arrow C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
  ?pr1

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
a: arrow C
vertex g → arrow C
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
a: arrow C
v: vertex g
arrow C

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
a: arrow C
v: vertex g
Σa:= lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) a: arrow C ⟦ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) a,
(fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)))
  a ⟧
arrow C

    exact (arrow_mor11 Σa).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
a: arrow C
(λ f : vertex g → arrow C,
 ∏ a b : vertex g, edge a b → arrow C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
  (λ v : vertex g,
   let Σa := lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) a in
   arrow_mor11 Σa)
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
a: arrow C
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
arrow C
⟦ let Σa := lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d u)) a in
  arrow_mor11 Σa,
let Σa := lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) a in arrow_mor11 Σa
⟧

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph

v0: vertex g

a: arrow C
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
Lu:= dob d u: total_category (LNWFS C)
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
mor:= dmor d e : total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Lu, Lv ⟧: total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Lu, Lv ⟧
α:= lnwfs_mor (pr2 Lu) (pr2 Lv) (pr1 mor): lnwfs_L_monad (pr2 Lu) ⟹ lnwfs_L_monad (pr2 Lv)
Mu:= fact_L (pr1 Lu): arrow C ⟶ arrow C
Mv:= fact_L (pr1 Lv): arrow C ⟶ arrow C
mulmor:= # Mu (α a) · α (Mv a): arrow C ⟦ Mu (lnwfs_L_monad (pr2 Lu) a),
lnwfs_L_monad (pr2 Lv) (Mv a) ⟧
arrow C
⟦ let Σa := lnwfs_Σ (pr2 Lu) a in arrow_mor11 Σa,

a: arrow C

C ⟦ pr21 (Mu a), pr21 (Mv a) ⟧

g: graph

lnwfs_L_monad (pr2 Lv) (Mv a) ⟧
?h · arrow_mor11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 Lv) a) =
arrow_mor11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 Lu) a) · ?k

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g

a: arrow C
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
Lu:= dob d u: total_category (LNWFS C)
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
mor:= dmor d e : total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Lu, Lv ⟧: total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Lu, Lv ⟧

Mu:= fact_L (pr1 Lu): arrow C ⟶ arrow C
Mv:= fact_L (pr1 Lv): arrow C ⟶ arrow C

lnwfs_L_monad (pr2 Lv) (Mv a) ⟧
C ⟦ pr21 (Mu a), pr21 (Mv a) ⟧
 exact (arrow_mor11 (α a)).
    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
a: arrow C
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
Lu:= dob d u: total_category (LNWFS C)
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
mor:= dmor d e : total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Lu, Lv ⟧: total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Lu, Lv ⟧

lnwfs_L_monad (pr2 Lv) (Mv a) ⟧
C ⟦ pr21 ((Mu ∙ Mu) a), pr21 ((Mv ∙ Mv) a) ⟧
 exact (arrow_mor11 mulmor).
    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
a: arrow C
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
Lu:= dob d u: total_category (LNWFS C)
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
mor:= dmor d e : total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Lu, Lv ⟧: total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Lu, Lv ⟧
α:= lnwfs_mor (pr2 Lu) (pr2 Lv) (pr1 mor): lnwfs_L_monad (pr2 Lu) ⟹ lnwfs_L_monad (pr2 Lv)
Mu:= fact_L (pr1 Lu): arrow C ⟶ arrow C
Mv:= fact_L (pr1 Lv): arrow C ⟶ arrow C
mulmor:= # Mu (α a) · α (Mv a): arrow C ⟦ Mu (lnwfs_L_monad (pr2 Lu) a),
lnwfs_L_monad (pr2 Lv) (Mv a) ⟧
arrow_mor11 (α a) · arrow_mor11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 Lv) a) =
arrow_mor11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 Lu) a) · arrow_mor11 mulmor
 abstract (
        set (morax := pr2 mor);
        set (moraxμa := pr1 morax a);
        etrans; [exact (pr2 (pathsdirprodweq (base_paths _ _ moraxμa)))|];
        apply assoc'
      ).
Defined.

Definition ccμ : ∏ (a : arrow C), ColimCocone (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor a) :=
    λ a, (arrow_colims CC) _ _.

Context (dbase := mapdiagram (pr1_category _) d).
Context (Finf := FfCC dbase).


C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
a: arrow C
C ⟦ arrow_cod (colim (ccμ a)),
three_ob1 (colim Finf (fact_L (colim Finf) a)) ⟧


C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g

dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
a: arrow C
C ⟦ arrow_cod (colim (ccμ a)),
three_ob1 (colim Finf (fact_L (colim Finf) a)) ⟧

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g

dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
a: arrow C
∏ u : vertex g,
C
⟦ dob
    (mapdiagram
       (PrecategoryBinProduct.pr2_functor C C)
       (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
          (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor a))) u,
dob
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 dbase
     (fact_L (colim Finf) a)) u ⟧
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
a: arrow C
∏ (u v : vertex g) (e : edge u v),
dmor
  (mapdiagram (PrecategoryBinProduct.pr2_functor C C)
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
        (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor a))) e
· ?f v =
?f u
· dmor
    (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 dbase
       (fact_L (colim Finf) a)) e

C
⟦ dob
    (mapdiagram

       (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))

dob

     (fact_L (colim Finf) a)) v ⟧

    (* cbn. *)

                  -->
       three_ob1 ((dob d v) (fact_L Finf a))

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
a: arrow C
v: vertex g
vinFinf:= colimIn Finf v: Ff C ⟦ dob dbase v, colim Finf ⟧
C
⟦ dob
    (mapdiagram
       (PrecategoryBinProduct.pr2_functor C C)
       (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
          (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor a))) v,
dob
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 dbase
     (fact_L (colim Finf) a)) v ⟧

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
a: arrow C
v: vertex g
vinFinf:= colimIn Finf v: Ff C ⟦ dob dbase v, colim Finf ⟧
LvinFinf:= three_mor_mor01
  (section_nat_trans vinFinf a): arrow C
⟦ three_mor01
    (section_functor (dob dbase v) a),
three_mor01
  (section_functor (colim Finf) a) ⟧
C
⟦ dob
    (mapdiagram
       (PrecategoryBinProduct.pr2_functor C C)
       (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
          (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor a))) v,
dob
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 dbase
     (fact_L (colim Finf) a)) v ⟧

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
a: arrow C
v: vertex g
vinFinf:= colimIn Finf v: Ff C ⟦ dob dbase v, colim Finf ⟧
LvinFinf:= three_mor_mor01
  (section_nat_trans vinFinf a): arrow C
⟦ three_mor01
    (section_functor (dob dbase v) a),
three_mor01
  (section_functor (colim Finf) a) ⟧
dobvLvinFinf:= # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf: three C
⟦ pr1 (dob d v)
    (three_mor01
       (section_functor (dob dbase v) a)),
pr1 (dob d v)
  (three_mor01
     (section_functor (colim Finf) a))
⟧
C
⟦ dob
    (mapdiagram
       (PrecategoryBinProduct.pr2_functor C C)
       (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
          (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor a))) v,
dob
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 dbase
     (fact_L (colim Finf) a)) v ⟧

    exact (three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
a: arrow C
∏ (u v : vertex g) (e : edge u v),
dmor
  (mapdiagram (PrecategoryBinProduct.pr2_functor C C)
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
        (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor a))) e
· (λ v0 : vertex g,
   let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v0 in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf a) in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v0)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf) v =
(λ v0 : vertex g,
 let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v0 in
 let LvinFinf :=
   three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf a) in
 let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v0)) LvinFinf in
 three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf) u
· dmor
    (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 dbase
       (fact_L (colim Finf) a)) e
 abstract (
      intros u v e;
      etrans; [apply assoc'|];
      set (morcolim := three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans (colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H (v0 := v0) (v := v)) a));
      set (dmorenat := (section_nt_disp_axioms_from_section_nt_disp (dmor dbase e)) _ _ morcolim);
      etrans; [apply cancel_precomposition; exact (pathsinv0 (base_paths _ _ dmorenat))|];
      etrans; [apply cancel_precomposition; apply pr1_transportf_const|];
      (* cbn. *)
      etrans; [apply assoc|];
      apply cancel_postcomposition;
      etrans; [apply pr1_section_disp_on_morphisms_comp|];
      use section_disp_on_eq_morphisms; [apply id_left|];
      apply (colimInCommutes (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase a))
    ).
Defined.


C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
a: arrow C
C ⟦ arrow_dom a, arrow_cod (colim (ccμ a)) ⟧


C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
a: arrow C
C ⟦ arrow_dom a, arrow_cod (colim (ccμ a)) ⟧

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
a: arrow C
ccμinv0:= colimIn (ccμ a) v0: arrow C
⟦ dob (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor a)
    v0, colim (ccμ a) ⟧
C ⟦ arrow_dom a, arrow_cod (colim (ccμ a)) ⟧

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
a: arrow C
ccμinv0:= colimIn (ccμ a) v0: arrow C
⟦ dob (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor a)
    v0, colim (ccμ a) ⟧
ccμinv011:= arrow_mor11 ccμinv0: (λ _ : C
       ⟦ pr11 (dob
                 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor
                    a) v0),
       pr11 (colim (ccμ a)) ⟧,
 C
 ⟦ pr21 (dob
           (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor
              a) v0), pr21 
 (colim (ccμ a)) ⟧) (pr11 ccμinv0)
C ⟦ arrow_dom a, arrow_cod (colim (ccμ a)) ⟧

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
a: arrow C
ccμinv0:= colimIn (ccμ a) v0: arrow C
⟦ dob (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor a)
    v0, colim (ccμ a) ⟧
ccμinv011:= arrow_mor11 ccμinv0: (λ _ : C
       ⟦ pr11 (dob
                 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor
                    a) v0),
       pr11 (colim (ccμ a)) ⟧,
 C
 ⟦ pr21 (dob
           (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor
              a) v0), pr21 
 (colim (ccμ a)) ⟧) (pr11 ccμinv0)
λλav0:= fact_L (pr1 (dob d v0))
  (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v0)) a): arrow C
C ⟦ arrow_dom a, arrow_cod (colim (ccμ a)) ⟧

  exact (λλav0 · ccμinv011).
Defined.


C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
f: arrow C
three_mor01 (pr1 (dob d v) f)
· arrow_mor11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f)
· three_mor11
    (# (pr1 (dob d v))
       (three_mor_mor01
          (section_nat_trans (colimIn Finf v) f))) =
three_mor01 (pr1 (dob d v) (fact_L (colim Finf) f))


C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
f: arrow C
three_mor01 (pr1 (dob d v) f)
· arrow_mor11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f)
· three_mor11
    (# (pr1 (dob d v))
       (three_mor_mor01
          (section_nat_trans (colimIn Finf v) f))) =
three_mor01 (pr1 (dob d v) (fact_L (colim Finf) f))

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
f: arrow C
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
three_mor01 (pr1 Lv f)
· arrow_mor11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 Lv) f)
· three_mor11
    (# (pr1 Lv)
       (three_mor_mor01
          (section_nat_trans (colimIn Finf v) f))) =
three_mor01 (pr1 Lv (fact_L (colim Finf) f))

  (* λf · σf · m11 = λ_{λ∞f}
    where λf · σf = λλf (component of comul)
    and λλf · m11 = λ_{λ∞f} (commutativity of fact_L (pr1 Lv) (fact_L (colim Finf)) f)
  *)
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
f: arrow C
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
three_mor01 (pr1 Lv f)
· arrow_mor11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 Lv) f)
· three_mor11
    (# (pr1 Lv)
       (three_mor_mor01
          (section_nat_trans (colimIn Finf v) f))) =
?b
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g

v: vertex g
f: arrow C
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
?b = three_mor01 (pr1 Lv (fact_L (colim Finf) f))

Σf:= lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f: arrow C ⟦ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f,

g: graph

  f ⟧
Σfcomm:= arrow_mor_comm Σf: (λ f0 : arrow_base C
        ⟦ pr1 (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f),
        pr1
          ((fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
            ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) f) ⟧,
 pr2 (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f) -->[

         ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) f))
  (pr1 Σf)

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))

v0: vertex g

dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)

v: vertex g
f: arrow C
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
Σf:= lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f: arrow C ⟦ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f,
(fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)))
  f ⟧
Σfcomm:= arrow_mor_comm Σf: (λ f0 : arrow_base C
        ⟦ pr1 (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f),
        pr1
          ((fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
            ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) f) ⟧,
 pr2 (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f) -->[
 f0] pr2
       ((fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
         ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) f))
  (pr1 Σf)
identity (pr11 (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f))
· pr2
    ((fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)))
       f) = ?f'

    apply id_left.
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
f: arrow C
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
pr2
  ((fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) f)
· three_mor11
    (# (pr1 Lv)
       (three_mor_mor01
          (section_nat_trans (colimIn Finf v) f))) =
three_mor01 (pr1 Lv (fact_L (colim Finf) f))

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
f: arrow C
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
pr2
  ((fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) f)
· three_mor11
    (# (pr1 Lv)
       (three_mor_mor01
          (section_nat_trans (colimIn Finf v) f))) =
?b

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))

v0: vertex g

Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
f: arrow C
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
LcolimIn:= # (pr1 Lv)
  (three_mor_mor01
     (section_nat_trans (colimIn Finf v) f)): three C
⟦ pr1 Lv
    (three_mor01
       (section_functor (dob dbase v) f)),
pr1 Lv
  (three_mor01
     (section_functor (colim Finf) f)) ⟧
pr2
  ((fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) f)
· three_mor11 LcolimIn = ?b

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
f: arrow C
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
LcolimIn:= # (pr1 Lv)
  (three_mor_mor01
     (section_nat_trans (colimIn Finf v) f)): three C
⟦ pr1 Lv
    (three_mor01
       (section_functor (dob dbase v) f)),
pr1 Lv
  (three_mor01
     (section_functor (colim Finf) f)) ⟧
LcolimIncomm01:= pr1 (three_mor_comm LcolimIn): pr122 (pr1 Lv
         (three_mor01
            (section_functor
               (dob dbase v) f)))
· pr12 LcolimIn =
pr111 LcolimIn
· pr122 (pr1 Lv
           (three_mor01
              (section_functor
                 (colim Finf) f)))
pr2
  ((fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) f)
· three_mor11 LcolimIn = ?b

    exact LcolimIncomm01.
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
f: arrow C
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
pr111 (# (pr1 Lv)
         (three_mor_mor01
            (section_nat_trans (colimIn Finf v) f)))
· pr122 (pr1 Lv
           (three_mor01
              (section_functor (colim Finf) f))) =
three_mor01 (pr1 Lv (fact_L (colim Finf) f))

  apply id_left.
Qed.

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
a: arrow C
identity (three_ob0 (colim Finf a)) · ccμ_cod_arrow a =
three_mor01 (colim Finf a)
· colimOfArrows
    (CC g
       (mapdiagram
          (PrecategoryBinProduct.pr1_functor C C)
          (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
             (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor a))))
    (CC g
       (mapdiagram
          (PrecategoryBinProduct.pr2_functor C C)
          (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
             (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor a))))
    (λ x : vertex g,
     pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor a) x))
    (arrow_colimit_subproof g
       (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor a))
 abstract (
      etrans; [apply id_left|];
      apply pathsinv0;
      etrans; [apply assoc'|];
      etrans; [apply cancel_precomposition;
              apply (colimOfArrowsIn _ _ (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase a))|];
      etrans; [apply assoc|];
      apply cancel_postcomposition;
      set (Σf := lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v0)) a);
      set (Σfcomm := arrow_mor_comm Σf);
      etrans; [exact (pathsinv0 Σfcomm)|];
      etrans; [apply cancel_postcomposition;
              exact (lnwfs_Σ_top_map_id _ a)|];
      apply id_left
    ).
Defined.

      set (LcolimIn := (# (fact_functor (pr1 (dob d v0))) (three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans (colimIn Finf v0) a))));
      set (LcolimIncomm01 := pr1 (three_mor_comm LcolimIn));

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr11 (# (fact_L (colim Finf)) γ) =
pr11 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data f)
· pr11 (# (fact_L (colim Finf) ∙ fact_L (colim Finf))
          γ)

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr11 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data f)
· pr11 (# (fact_L (colim Finf) ∙ fact_L (colim Finf))
          γ) = pr11 (# (fact_L (colim Finf)) γ)

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr11 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data f)
· pr11 (# (fact_L (colim Finf) ∙ fact_L (colim Finf))
          γ) = ?b
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
?b = pr11 (# (fact_L (colim Finf)) γ)
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr11 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_first_mor f)
· (pr11 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f)
   · pr11 (# (fact_L (colim Finf)
              ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) γ)) =
pr11 (# (fact_L (colim Finf)) γ)

pr11 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_first_mor f)
· (pr11 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f)
   · pr11 (# (fact_L (colim Finf)
              ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) γ)) = ?b

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g

Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C

pr11 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f)
· pr11 (# (fact_L (colim Finf) ∙ fact_L (colim Finf))
          γ) = pr11 (# (fact_L (colim Finf)) γ)

    apply id_left.
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf)) γ)
· pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data f') =
pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data f)
· pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf) ∙ fact_L (colim Finf))
          γ)
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
∏ u : vertex g,
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) u
· (pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf)) γ)
   · pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data f')) =
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) u
· (pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data f)
   · pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf)
              ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) γ))

Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
v: vertex g
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v
· (pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf)) γ)
   · pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data f')) =
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v
· (pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data f)
   · pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf)
              ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) γ))

    (* cbn. *)

CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g

Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
v: vertex g
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v
· pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf)) γ)
· pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data f') =

   · pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf)

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
v: vertex g
(λ v : vertex g,
 let Dv := dob dbase v in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv γ)) v
· colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f') v
· pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data f') =
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v
· (pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data f)
   · pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf)
              ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) γ))

    (* cbn. *)
    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
v: vertex g
(let Dv := dob dbase v in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv γ))
· colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f') v
· pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_first_mor f')
· pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f') =
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v
· (pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data f)
   · pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf)
              ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) γ))

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
v: vertex g
(let Dv := dob dbase v in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv γ))
· (colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f') v
   · pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_first_mor f'))
· pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f') =
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v
· (pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data f)
   · pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf)
              ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) γ))

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
v: vertex g
(let Dv := dob dbase v in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv γ))
· ((λ x : vertex g,
    pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f') x))
     v
   · colimIn
       (CC g
          (mapdiagram
             (PrecategoryBinProduct.pr2_functor C C)
             (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f'))))
       v)
· pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f') =
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v
· (pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data f)
   · pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf)
              ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) γ))

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
v: vertex g
(let Dv := dob dbase v in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv γ))
· pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f') v)
· colimIn
    (CC g
       (mapdiagram
          (PrecategoryBinProduct.pr2_functor C C)
          (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
             (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f'))))
    v · pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f') =
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v
· (pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data f)
   · pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf)
              ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) γ))

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
v: vertex g
(let Dv := dob dbase v in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv γ))
· pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f') v)
· (colimIn
     (CC g
        (mapdiagram
           (PrecategoryBinProduct.pr2_functor C C)
           (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
              (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f'))))
     v · pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f')) =
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v
· (pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data f)
   · pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf)
              ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) γ))

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
v: vertex g
(let Dv := dob dbase v in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv γ))
· pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f') v)
· ((λ v : vertex g,
    let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
    let LvinFinf :=
      three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f')
      in
    let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
    three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf) v
   · colimIn
       (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase (fact_L (colim Finf) f'))
       v) =
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v
· (pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data f)
   · pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf)
              ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) γ))

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
v: vertex g
(let Dv := dob dbase v in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv γ))
· pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f') v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f') in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· colimIn
    (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase (fact_L (colim Finf) f')) v =
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v
· (pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data f)
   · pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf)
              ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) γ))

g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g

Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
v: vertex g
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v
· (pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data f)
   · pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf)
              ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) γ)) =
(let Dv := dob dbase v in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv γ))
· pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f') v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f') in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· colimIn
    (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase (fact_L (colim Finf) f')) v

g: graph

H: is_connected g

f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
v: vertex g
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v
· pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_first_mor f)
· pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f)
· pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf) ∙ fact_L (colim Finf))
          γ) =
(let Dv := dob dbase v in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv γ))
· pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f') v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=

   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
v: vertex g
(λ x : vertex g,
 pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) x)) v
· colimIn
    (CC g
       (mapdiagram
          (PrecategoryBinProduct.pr2_functor C C)
          (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
             (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f))))
    v · pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f)
· pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf) ∙ fact_L (colim Finf))
          γ) =
(let Dv := dob dbase v in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv γ))
· pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f') v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f') in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· colimIn
    (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase (fact_L (colim Finf) f')) v

    (* cbn. *)
    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
v: vertex g
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· (colimIn
     (CC g
        (mapdiagram
           (PrecategoryBinProduct.pr2_functor C C)
           (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
              (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f))))
     v · pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f))
· pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf) ∙ fact_L (colim Finf))
          γ) =
(let Dv := dob dbase v in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv γ))
· pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f') v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f') in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· colimIn
    (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase (fact_L (colim Finf) f')) v

    (* unfold ccμ_cod_preservation_mor. *)
    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
v: vertex g
ccbase:= CC g
  (mapdiagram
     (PrecategoryBinProduct.pr2_functor C C)
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
        (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f))): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (PrecategoryBinProduct.pr2_functor C C)
     (mapdiagram
        (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
        (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f)))
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· (colimIn ccbase v
   · pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f))
· pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf) ∙ fact_L (colim Finf))
          γ) =
(let Dv := dob dbase v in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv γ))
· pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f') v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f') in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· colimIn
    (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase (fact_L (colim Finf) f')) v

      three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in

   · colimIn

       v)
· pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf) ∙ fact_L (colim Finf))
          γ) =
(let Dv := dob dbase v in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv γ))
· pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f') v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f') in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· colimIn
    (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase (fact_L (colim Finf) f')) v

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g

dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
v: vertex g
(let Dv := dob dbase v in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv γ))
· pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f') v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f') in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf) =
