· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· (let Dv := dob dbase v in
   pr1
     (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
        (# (fact_L (colim Finf)) γ)))

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
v: vertex g
Σnat:= nat_trans_ax (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v))) f f' γ: # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
· lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f' =
lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f
· # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
     ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
(let Dv := dob dbase v in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv γ))
· pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f') v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f') in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf) =
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· (let Dv := dob dbase v in
   pr1
     (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
        (# (fact_L (colim Finf)) γ)))

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
v: vertex g
Σnat:= nat_trans_ax (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v))) f f' γ: # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
· lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f' =
lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f
· # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
     ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
Σnat11:= pr2
  (pathsdirprodweq
     (base_paths
        (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
         · lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f')
        (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f
         · # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
              ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
        Σnat)): (λ _ : pr11 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
       · pr11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f') =
       pr11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f)
       · pr11 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
                  ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ),
 pr21 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
 · pr21 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f') =
 pr21 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f)
 · pr21 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
            ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ))
  (pr1
     (pathsdirprodweq
        (base_paths
           (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
            · lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f')
           (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f
            · # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
                 ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
           Σnat)))
(let Dv := dob dbase v in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv γ))
· pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f') v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f') in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf) =
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· (let Dv := dob dbase v in
   pr1
     (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
        (# (fact_L (colim Finf)) γ)))

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C

· lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f' =
lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f
· # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
     ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
Σnat11:= pr2
  (pathsdirprodweq
     (base_paths
        (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
         · lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f')
        (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f
         · # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
              ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
        Σnat)): (λ _ : pr11 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
       · pr11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f') =
       pr11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f)
       · pr11 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
                  ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ),
 pr21 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
 · pr21 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f') =
 pr21 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f)
 · pr21 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
            ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ))
  (pr1
     (pathsdirprodweq
        (base_paths
           (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
            · lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f')
           (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f
            · # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
                 ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
           Σnat)))
pr21 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f)
· pr21 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
           ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f') in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf) =
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· (let Dv := dob dbase v in
   pr1
     (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
        (# (fact_L (colim Finf)) γ)))

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
v: vertex g
Σnat:= nat_trans_ax (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v))) f f' γ: # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
· lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f' =
lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f
· # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
     ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
Σnat11:= pr2
  (pathsdirprodweq
     (base_paths
        (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
         · lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f')
        (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f
         · # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
              ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
        Σnat)): (λ _ : pr11 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
       · pr11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f') =
       pr11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f)
       · pr11 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
                  ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ),
 pr21 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
 · pr21 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f') =
 pr21 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f)
 · pr21 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
            ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ))
  (pr1
     (pathsdirprodweq
        (base_paths
           (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
            · lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f')
           (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f
            · # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
                 ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
           Σnat)))
pr21 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f)
· (pr21 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
            ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
   · (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
      let LvinFinf :=
        three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f')
        in
      let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf
        in
      three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)) =
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· (let Dv := dob dbase v in
   pr1
     (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
        (# (fact_L (colim Finf)) γ)))

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g

Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
v: vertex g
Σnat:= nat_trans_ax (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v))) f f' γ: # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
· lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f' =
lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f
· # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
     ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
Σnat11:= pr2
  (pathsdirprodweq
     (base_paths
        (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
         · lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f')
        (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f
         · # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
              ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
        Σnat)): (λ _ : pr11 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
       · pr11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f') =
       pr11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f)
       · pr11 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
                  ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ),
 pr21 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
 · pr21 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f') =
 pr21 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f)
 · pr21 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
            ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ))
  (pr1
     (pathsdirprodweq
        (base_paths
           (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
            · lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f')
           (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f
            · # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
                 ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
           Σnat)))

· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· (let Dv := dob dbase v in
   pr1
     (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
        (# (fact_L (colim Finf)) γ))) =
pr21 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f)
· (pr21 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
            ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
   · (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
      let LvinFinf :=
        three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f')
        in
      let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf
        in
      three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf))

g: graph

H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g

f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
v: vertex g
Σnat:= nat_trans_ax (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v))) f f' γ: # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
· lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f' =
lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f
· # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
     ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ

  (pathsdirprodweq
     (base_paths
        (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
         · lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f')
        (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f
         · # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
              ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
        Σnat)): (λ _ : pr11 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
       · pr11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f') =
       pr11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f)
       · pr11 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
                  ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ),
 pr21 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
 · pr21 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f') =
 pr21 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f)
 · pr21 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
            ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ))
  (pr1
     (pathsdirprodweq
        (base_paths
           (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
            · lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f')
           (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f
            · # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
                 ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
           Σnat)))
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· ((let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
    let LvinFinf :=
      three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
    let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
    three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
   · (let Dv := dob dbase v in
      pr1
        (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
           (# (fact_L (colim Finf)) γ)))) =
pr21 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f)
· (pr21 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
            ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
   · (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
      let LvinFinf :=
        three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f')
        in
      let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf
        in
      three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf))

g: graph

· lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f' =

· # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
     ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ

  (pathsdirprodweq
     (base_paths
        (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
         · lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f')
        (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f
         · # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
              ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
        Σnat)): (λ _ : pr11 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
       · pr11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f') =
       pr11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f)
       · pr11 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
                  ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ),
 pr21 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
 · pr21 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f') =
 pr21 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f)
 · pr21 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
            ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ))
  (pr1
     (pathsdirprodweq
        (base_paths
           (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
            · lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f')
           (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f
            · # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
                 ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
           Σnat)))
(let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in

   three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
 let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
 three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· (let Dv := dob dbase v in
   pr1
     (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
        (# (fact_L (colim Finf)) γ))) =
pr21 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
         ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f') in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g

dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
v: vertex g
Σnat:= nat_trans_ax (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v))) f f' γ: # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
· lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f' =
lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f
· # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
     ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
Σnat11:= pr2
  (pathsdirprodweq
     (base_paths
        (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
         · lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f')
        (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f
         · # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
              ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
        Σnat)): (λ _ : pr11 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
       · pr11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f') =
       pr11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f)
       · pr11 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
                  ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ),
 pr21 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
 · pr21 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f') =
 pr21 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f)
 · pr21 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
            ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ))
  (pr1
     (pathsdirprodweq
        (base_paths
           (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
            · lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f')
           (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f
            · # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
                 ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
           Σnat)))
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (dob dbase v)
     (pr1
        (# (pr1 (dob d v))
           (three_mor_mor01
              (section_nat_trans (colimIn Finf v) f)))
      · # (fact_L (colim Finf)) γ)) =
pr21 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
         ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f') in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)

           (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
            · lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f')
           (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f
            · # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
                 ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
           Σnat)))
arrow_mor00
  (pr1
     (# (pr1 (dob d v)) (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ))
   · pr1
       (# (pr1 (dob d v))
          (three_mor_mor01
             (section_nat_trans (colimIn Finf v) f')))) =
arrow_mor00
  (pr1
     (# (pr1 (dob d v))
        (three_mor_mor01
           (section_nat_trans (colimIn Finf v) f)))
   · # (fact_L (colim Finf)) γ)

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
v: vertex g
Σnat:= nat_trans_ax (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v))) f f' γ: # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
· lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f' =
lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f
· # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
     ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
Σnat11:= pr2
  (pathsdirprodweq
     (base_paths
        (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
         · lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f')
        (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f
         · # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
              ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
        Σnat)): (λ _ : pr11 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
       · pr11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f') =
       pr11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f)
       · pr11 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
                  ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ),
 pr21 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
 · pr21 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f') =
 pr21 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f)
 · pr21 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
            ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ))
  (pr1
     (pathsdirprodweq
        (base_paths
           (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ
            · lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f')
           (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f
            · # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))
                 ∙ fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ)
           Σnat)))
(λ v : vertex g,
 let Dv := dob dbase v in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv γ)) v
· colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f') v =
arrow_mor11
  (pr1
     (# (pr1 (dob d v)) (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v))) γ))
   · pr1
       (# (pr1 (dob d v))
          (three_mor_mor01
             (section_nat_trans (colimIn Finf v) f'))))

      reflexivity.
Qed.

Definition LNWFS_colim_comul :
    (fact_L (colim Finf)) ⟹ ((fact_L (colim Finf)) ∙ (fact_L (colim Finf))) :=
  (_,, LNWFS_colim_comul_ax).


C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
three_mor01
  (pr1 (dob d v0) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v0)) f))
· arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v0) =
three_mor01 (pr1 (dob d v) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f))
· arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v)


C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))

dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
three_mor01
  (pr1 (dob d v0) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v0)) f))
· arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v0) =
three_mor01 (pr1 (dob d v) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f))
· arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v)

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
predicate:= λ v : vertex g,
three_mor01
  (pr1 (dob d v0)
     (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v0)) f))
· arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v0) =
three_mor01
  (pr1 (dob d v) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f))
· arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v): vertex g → UU
three_mor01
  (pr1 (dob d v0) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v0)) f))
· arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v0) =
three_mor01 (pr1 (dob d v) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f))
· arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v)


  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
predicate:= λ v : vertex g,
three_mor01
  (pr1 (dob d v0)
     (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v0)) f))
· arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v0) =
three_mor01
  (pr1 (dob d v) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f))
· arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v): vertex g → UU
He: ∏ u u' : vertex g,
edge u u'
→ three_mor01
    (pr1 (dob d u) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d u)) f))
  · arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) u) =
  three_mor01
    (pr1 (dob d u') (fact_L (pr1 (dob d u')) f))
  · arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) u')
three_mor01
  (pr1 (dob d v0) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v0)) f))
· arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v0) =
three_mor01 (pr1 (dob d v) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f))
· arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v)
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
predicate:= λ v : vertex g,
three_mor01
  (pr1 (dob d v0)
     (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v0)) f))
· arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v0) =
three_mor01
  (pr1 (dob d v) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f))
· arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v): vertex g → UU
∏ u u' : vertex g,
edge u u'
→ three_mor01
    (pr1 (dob d u) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d u)) f))
  · arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) u) =
  three_mor01
    (pr1 (dob d u') (fact_L (pr1 (dob d u')) f))
  · arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) u')

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
predicate:= λ v : vertex g,
three_mor01
  (pr1 (dob d v0)
     (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v0)) f))
· arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v0) =
three_mor01
  (pr1 (dob d v) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f))
· arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v): vertex g → UU
u, u': vertex g
e: edge u u'
cinc:= colimInCommutes (ccμ f) u u' e: dmor (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) e
· colimIn (ccμ f) u' = colimIn (ccμ f) u
three_mor01 (pr1 (dob d u) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d u)) f))
· arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) u) =
three_mor01
  (pr1 (dob d u') (fact_L (pr1 (dob d u')) f))
· arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) u')

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
predicate:= λ v : vertex g,
three_mor01
  (pr1 (dob d v0)
     (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v0)) f))
· arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v0) =
three_mor01
  (pr1 (dob d v) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f))
· arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v): vertex g → UU
u, u': vertex g
e: edge u u'
cinc:= colimInCommutes (ccμ f) u u' e: dmor (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) e
· colimIn (ccμ f) u' = colimIn (ccμ f) u
three_mor01 (pr1 (dob d u) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d u)) f))
· arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) u) = ?b

v: vertex g

     (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v0)) f))

u, u': vertex g
e: edge u u'
cinc:= colimInCommutes (ccμ f) u u' e: dmor (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) e
· colimIn (ccμ f) u' = colimIn (ccμ f) u
three_mor01 (pr1 (dob d u) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d u)) f))
· pr21 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d u)))
          (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d u)) (pr2 (dob d u'))
             (pr1
                (dmor d e
                 :
                 total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ dob d u,
                 dob d u' ⟧)) f))
· pr21 (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d u)) (pr2 (dob d u'))
          (pr1
             (dmor d e
              :
              total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ dob d u,
              dob d u' ⟧)) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d u')) f)) =
three_mor01
  (pr1 (dob d u') (fact_L (pr1 (dob d u')) f))

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
predicate:= λ v : vertex g,
three_mor01
  (pr1 (dob d v0)
     (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v0)) f))
· arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v0) =
three_mor01
  (pr1 (dob d v) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f))
· arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v): vertex g → UU
u, u': vertex g
e: edge u u'
cinc:= colimInCommutes (ccμ f) u u' e: dmor (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) e
· colimIn (ccμ f) u' = colimIn (ccμ f) u
e01:= three_mor_mor01
  (section_nat_trans (pr1 (dmor d e)) f): arrow C
⟦ three_mor01
    (section_functor (pr1 (dob d u)) f),
three_mor01 (section_functor (pr1 (dob d u')) f)
⟧
three_mor01 (pr1 (dob d u) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d u)) f))
· pr21 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d u)))
          (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d u)) (pr2 (dob d u'))
             (pr1 (dmor d e)) f)) = ?f'

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
predicate:= λ v : vertex g,
three_mor01
  (pr1 (dob d v0)
     (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v0)) f))
· arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v0) =
three_mor01
  (pr1 (dob d v) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f))
· arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v): vertex g → UU
u, u': vertex g
e: edge u u'
cinc:= colimInCommutes (ccμ f) u u' e: dmor (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) e
· colimIn (ccμ f) u' = colimIn (ccμ f) u
e01:= three_mor_mor01
  (section_nat_trans (pr1 (dmor d e)) f): arrow C
⟦ three_mor01
    (section_functor (pr1 (dob d u)) f),
three_mor01 (section_functor (pr1 (dob d u')) f)
⟧
Lue01:= # (fact_L (pr1 (dob d u))) e01: arrow C
⟦ fact_L (pr1 (dob d u))
    (three_mor01
       (section_functor (pr1 (dob d u)) f)),
fact_L (pr1 (dob d u))
  (three_mor01
     (section_functor (pr1 (dob d u')) f)) ⟧
three_mor01 (pr1 (dob d u) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d u)) f))
· pr21 (# (fact_L (pr1 (dob d u)))
          (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d u)) (pr2 (dob d u'))
             (pr1 (dmor d e)) f)) = ?f'

u, u': vertex g
e: edge u u'
cinc:= colimInCommutes (ccμ f) u u' e: dmor (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) e
· colimIn (ccμ f) u' = colimIn (ccμ f) u
e01:= three_mor_mor01
  (section_nat_trans (pr1 (dmor d e))
     (fact_L (pr1 (dob d u')) f)): arrow C
⟦ three_mor01
    (section_functor (pr1 (dob d u))
       (fact_L (pr1 (dob d u')) f)),
three_mor01
  (section_functor (pr1 (dob d u'))
     (fact_L (pr1 (dob d u')) f)) ⟧
pr11 e01
· pr2
    (three_mor01
       (section_functor (pr1 (dob d u'))
          (fact_L (pr1 (dob d u')) f))) =
three_mor01
  (pr1 (dob d u') (fact_L (pr1 (dob d u')) f))

  apply id_left.
Qed.


C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
arrow_mor11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f)
· three_mor11
    (# (pr1 (dob d v))
       (three_mor_mor01
          (section_nat_trans_data
             (colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H) f)))
· three_mor11
    (# (pr1 (dob d v)) (LNWFS_colim_comul_data f)) =
arrow_mor11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f)
· three_mor11
    (# (pr1 (dob d v))
       (three_mor_mor01
          (section_nat_trans_data
             (colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H) f)))
· arrow_mor11
    (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) (fact_L (colim Finf) f))
· three_mor11
    (# (pr1 (dob d v))
       (three_mor_mor01
          (section_nat_trans_data
             (colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H)
             (fact_L (colim Finf) f))))

?b
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· # (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c) =
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv) c)
?b =
arrow_mor11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 Lv) f)
· three_mor11
    (# (pr1 Lv)
       (three_mor_mor01
          (section_nat_trans_data
             (colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H) f)))
· arrow_mor11
    (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 Lv) (fact_L (colim Finf) f))
· three_mor11
    (# (pr1 Lv)
       (three_mor_mor01
          (section_nat_trans_data
             (colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H)
             (fact_L (colim Finf) f))))

CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· # (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c) =
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv) c)
?h · ccμ_cod_arrow f =
three_mor01 (pr1 (dob d v) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f))
· ?k

      
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d

Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· # (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c) =
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv) c)
C
⟦ three_ob0 (pr1 (dob d v) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f)),
arrow_dom f ⟧
 exact (identity _).
      
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· # (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c) =
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv) c)
C
⟦ three_ob1 (pr1 (dob d v) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f)),
arrow_cod (colim (ccμ f)) ⟧
 exact (arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v)).
      
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· # (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c) =
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv) c)
identity
  (three_ob0
     (pr1 (dob d v) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f)))
· ccμ_cod_arrow f =
three_mor01 (pr1 (dob d v) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f))
· arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v)
 abstract (
          etrans; [apply id_left|];
          exact (LNWFS_colim_comul_monad_ax_subproof1 f v)
        ).
    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· # (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c) =
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv) c)
arrow_mor00
  (pr1
     (# (pr1 Lv)
        (three_mor_mor01
           (section_nat_trans_data
              (colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H) f)))
   · pr1
       (# (pr1 Lv)
          (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_first_mor f))) =
arrow_mor00
  (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f
   · mors_to_arrow_mor
       (three_mor01
          (pr1 (dob d v) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f)))
       (ccμ_cod_arrow f)
       (identity
          (three_ob0
             (pr1 (dob d v) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f))))
       (arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v))
       (LNWFS_colim_comul_monad_ax_subproof_subproof f
          v))

identity (pr11 (fact_L (pr1 Lv) f))

   · pr1

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d

f: arrow C
v: vertex g
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· # (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c) =
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv) c)
(λ x : vertex g,
 pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) x)) v
· colimIn
    (CC g
       (mapdiagram
          (PrecategoryBinProduct.pr2_functor C C)
          (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
             (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f))))
    v =
arrow_mor11
  (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f
   · mors_to_arrow_mor
       (three_mor01
          (pr1 (dob d v) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f)))
       (ccμ_cod_arrow f)
       (identity
          (three_ob0
             (pr1 (dob d v) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f))))
       (arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v))
       (LNWFS_colim_comul_monad_ax_subproof_subproof f
          v))

      reflexivity.

law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· # (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c) =
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv) c)
arrow_mor11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 Lv) f)
· (pr1
     (section_disp_on_morphisms (pr1 Lv)
        (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f
         · mors_to_arrow_mor
             (three_mor01
                (pr1 (dob d v)
                   (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f)))
             (ccμ_cod_arrow f)
             (identity
                (three_ob0
                   (pr1 (dob d v)
                      (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f))))
             (arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v))
             (LNWFS_colim_comul_monad_ax_subproof_subproof
                f v)))
   · pr12 (# (pr1 Lv)
             (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f))) =
arrow_mor11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 Lv) f)
· three_mor11
    (# (pr1 Lv)
       (three_mor_mor01
          (section_nat_trans_data
             (colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H) f)))
· arrow_mor11
    (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 Lv) (fact_L (colim Finf) f))
· three_mor11
    (# (pr1 Lv)
       (three_mor_mor01
          (section_nat_trans_data
             (colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H)
             (fact_L (colim Finf) f))))

g: graph

v: vertex g

H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· # (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c) =
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv) c)
arrow_mor11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 Lv) f)
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms (pr1 Lv)
       (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 (dob d v)) f))
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms (pr1 Lv)
       (mors_to_arrow_mor
          (three_mor01
             (pr1 (dob d v) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f)))
          (ccμ_cod_arrow f)
          (identity
             (three_ob0
                (pr1 (dob d v)
                   (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f))))
          (arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v))
          (LNWFS_colim_comul_monad_ax_subproof_subproof
             f v)))
· pr12 (# (pr1 Lv)
          (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f)) =
arrow_mor11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 Lv) f)
· three_mor11
    (# (pr1 Lv)
       (three_mor_mor01
          (section_nat_trans_data
             (colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H) f)))
· arrow_mor11
    (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 Lv) (fact_L (colim Finf) f))
· three_mor11
    (# (pr1 Lv)
       (three_mor_mor01
          (section_nat_trans_data
             (colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H)
             (fact_L (colim Finf) f))))

v0: vertex g

dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· # (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c) =
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv) c)
arrow_mor11 (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 Lv) f)
· three_mor11
    (# (pr1 Lv)
       (three_mor_mor01
          (section_nat_trans_data
             (colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H) f)))
· arrow_mor11
    (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 Lv) (fact_L (colim Finf) f))
· three_mor11
    (# (pr1 Lv)
       (three_mor_mor01
          (section_nat_trans_data
             (colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H)
             (fact_L (colim Finf) f)))) =
pr21 (δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) f)
· (pr21 (δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
           (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv) f))
   · (pr1
        (section_disp_on_morphisms (pr1 Lv)
           (mors_to_arrow_mor
              (three_mor01
                 (pr1 (dob d v)
                    (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f)))
              (ccμ_cod_arrow f)
              (identity
                 (three_ob0
                    (pr1 (dob d v)
                       (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f))))
              (arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v))
              (LNWFS_colim_comul_monad_ax_subproof_subproof
                 f v)))
      · pr12 (# (pr1 Lv)
                (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f))))

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· # (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c) =
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv) c)
mor:= three_mor_mor01
  (section_nat_trans_data
     (colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H) f): arrow C
⟦ three_mor01 (section_functor (dob dbase v) f),
three_mor01
  (section_functor (ColimFf CC dbase v0) f) ⟧
three_mor11 (# (pr1 Lv) mor)
· (arrow_mor11
     (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 Lv) (fact_L (colim Finf) f))
   · three_mor11
       (# (pr1 Lv)
          (three_mor_mor01
             (section_nat_trans_data
                (colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H)
                (fact_L (colim Finf) f))))) =
pr21 (δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
        (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv) f))
· (pr1
     (section_disp_on_morphisms (pr1 Lv)
        (mors_to_arrow_mor
           (three_mor01
              (pr1 (dob d v)
                 (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f)))
           (ccμ_cod_arrow f)
           (identity
              (three_ob0
                 (pr1 (dob d v)
                    (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f))))
           (arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v))
           (LNWFS_colim_comul_monad_ax_subproof_subproof
              f v)))
   · pr12 (# (pr1 Lv)
             (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f)))

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· # (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c) =
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv) c)
mor:= three_mor_mor01
  (section_nat_trans_data
     (colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H) f): arrow C
⟦ three_mor01 (section_functor (dob dbase v) f),
three_mor01
  (section_functor (ColimFf CC dbase v0) f) ⟧
LΣnatFinff:= nat_trans_ax (pr12 Lv)
  (three_mor01
     (section_functor (dob dbase v) f))
  (three_mor01
     (section_functor
        (ColimFf CC dbase v0) f)) mor: # (fact_L (pr1 Lv)) mor
· (pr12 Lv)
    (three_mor01
       (section_functor
          (ColimFf CC dbase v0) f)) =
(pr12 Lv)
  (three_mor01
     (section_functor (dob dbase v) f))
· # (fact_L (pr1 Lv) ∙ fact_L (pr1 Lv))
    mor
three_mor11 (# (pr1 Lv) mor)
· (arrow_mor11
     (lnwfs_Σ (pr2 Lv) (fact_L (colim Finf) f))
   · three_mor11
       (# (pr1 Lv)
          (three_mor_mor01
             (section_nat_trans_data
                (colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H)
                (fact_L (colim Finf) f))))) =
pr21 (δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
        (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv) f))
· (pr1
     (section_disp_on_morphisms (pr1 Lv)
        (mors_to_arrow_mor
           (three_mor01
              (pr1 (dob d v)
                 (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f)))
           (ccμ_cod_arrow f)
           (identity
              (three_ob0
                 (pr1 (dob d v)
                    (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f))))
           (arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v))
           (LNWFS_colim_comul_monad_ax_subproof_subproof
              f v)))
   · pr12 (# (pr1 Lv)
             (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f)))

        (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv) f))
· (pr1
     (section_disp_on_morphisms 
        (pr1 Lv)
        (mors_to_arrow_mor
           (three_mor01
              (pr1 (dob d v)
                 (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f)))
           (ccμ_cod_arrow f)
           (identity
              (three_ob0
                 (pr1 (dob d v)
                    (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f))))
           (arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v))
           (LNWFS_colim_comul_monad_ax_subproof_subproof
              f v)))
   · pr12 (# (pr1 Lv)
             (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f)))
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· # (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c) =
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv) c)
mor:= three_mor_mor01
  (section_nat_trans_data
     (colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H) f): arrow C
⟦ three_mor01 (section_functor (dob dbase v) f),
three_mor01
  (section_functor (ColimFf CC dbase v0) f) ⟧
LΣnatFinff:= nat_trans_ax (pr12 Lv)
  (three_mor01
     (section_functor (dob dbase v) f))
  (three_mor01
     (section_functor
        (ColimFf CC dbase v0) f)) mor: # (fact_L (pr1 Lv)) mor
· (pr12 Lv)
    (three_mor01
       (section_functor
          (ColimFf CC dbase v0) f)) =
(pr12 Lv)
  (three_mor01
     (section_functor (dob dbase v) f))
· # (fact_L (pr1 Lv) ∙ fact_L (pr1 Lv))
    mor
pr21 ((pr12 Lv)
        (three_mor01 (section_functor (dob dbase v) f)))
· (pr21 (# (fact_L (pr1 Lv) ∙ fact_L (pr1 Lv)) mor)
   · three_mor11
       (# (pr1 Lv)
          (three_mor_mor01
             (section_nat_trans_data
                (colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H)
                (fact_L (colim Finf) f))))) =
pr21 (δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
        (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv) f))
· (pr1
     (section_disp_on_morphisms (pr1 Lv)
        (mors_to_arrow_mor
           (three_mor01
              (pr1 (dob d v)
                 (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f)))
           (ccμ_cod_arrow f)
           (identity
              (three_ob0
                 (pr1 (dob d v)
                    (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f))))
           (arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v))
           (LNWFS_colim_comul_monad_ax_subproof_subproof
              f v)))
   · pr12 (# (pr1 Lv)
             (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f)))

     (mors_to_arrow_mor
        (three_mor01
           (pr1 (dob d v) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f)))
        (ccμ_cod_arrow f)
        (identity
           (three_ob0
              (pr1 (dob d v)
                 (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f))))
        (arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v))
        (LNWFS_colim_comul_monad_ax_subproof_subproof
           f v)
      · pr1
          (# (pr1 Lv)
             (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f)))) =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (pr1 Lv)
     (pr1 (# (pr1 Lv) (# (fact_L (pr1 Lv)) mor))
      · pr1
          (# (pr1 Lv)
             (three_mor_mor01
                (section_nat_trans_data
                   (colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H)
                   (fact_L (colim Finf) f))))))

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· # (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c) =
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv) c)
mor:= three_mor_mor01
  (section_nat_trans_data
     (colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H) f): arrow C
⟦ three_mor01 (section_functor (dob dbase v) f),
three_mor01
  (section_functor (ColimFf CC dbase v0) f) ⟧
LΣnatFinff:= nat_trans_ax (pr12 Lv)
  (three_mor01
     (section_functor (dob dbase v) f))
  (three_mor01
     (section_functor
        (ColimFf CC dbase v0) f)) mor: # (fact_L (pr1 Lv)) mor
· (pr12 Lv)
    (three_mor01
       (section_functor
          (ColimFf CC dbase v0) f)) =
(pr12 Lv)
  (three_mor01
     (section_functor (dob dbase v) f))
· # (fact_L (pr1 Lv) ∙ fact_L (pr1 Lv))
    mor
arrow_mor11
  (mors_to_arrow_mor
     (three_mor01
        (pr1 (dob d v) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f)))
     (ccμ_cod_arrow f)
     (identity
        (three_ob0
           (pr1 (dob d v) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f))))
     (arrow_mor11 (colimIn (ccμ f) v))
     (LNWFS_colim_comul_monad_ax_subproof_subproof f v)
   · pr1
       (# (pr1 Lv)
          (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f))) =
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# (pr1 Lv) (# (fact_L (pr1 Lv)) mor))
   · pr1
       (# (pr1 Lv)
          (three_mor_mor01
             (section_nat_trans_data
                (colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H)
                (fact_L (colim Finf) f)))))

  (* cbn. *)

(pr12 Lv)
  (three_mor01
     (section_functor (dob dbase v) f))

     (LNWFS_colim_comul_monad_ax_subproof_subproof f v)
   · pr1
       (# (pr1 Lv)
          (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f))) = 
?b
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· # (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c) =
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv) c)
mor:= three_mor_mor01
  (section_nat_trans_data
     (colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H) f): arrow C
⟦ three_mor01 (section_functor (dob dbase v) f),
three_mor01
  (section_functor (ColimFf CC dbase v0) f) ⟧
LΣnatFinff:= nat_trans_ax (pr12 Lv)
  (three_mor01
     (section_functor (dob dbase v) f))
  (three_mor01
     (section_functor
        (ColimFf CC dbase v0) f)) mor: # (fact_L (pr1 Lv)) mor
· (pr12 Lv)
    (three_mor01
       (section_functor
          (ColimFf CC dbase v0) f)) =
(pr12 Lv)
  (three_mor01
     (section_functor (dob dbase v) f))
· # (fact_L (pr1 Lv) ∙ fact_L (pr1 Lv))
    mor
?b =
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# (pr1 Lv) (# (fact_L (pr1 Lv)) mor))
   · pr1
       (# (pr1 Lv)
          (three_mor_mor01
             (section_nat_trans_data
                (colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H)
                (fact_L (colim Finf) f)))))
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· # (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c) =
δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv)) c
· δ (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv))
    (L_monad (pr1 Lv) (pr12 Lv) (pr22 Lv) c)
mor:= three_mor_mor01
  (section_nat_trans_data
     (colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H) f): arrow C
⟦ three_mor01 (section_functor (dob dbase v) f),
three_mor01
  (section_functor (ColimFf CC dbase v0) f) ⟧
LΣnatFinff:= nat_trans_ax (pr12 Lv)
  (three_mor01
     (section_functor (dob dbase v) f))
  (three_mor01
     (section_functor
        (ColimFf CC dbase v0) f)) mor: # (fact_L (pr1 Lv)) mor
· (pr12 Lv)
    (three_mor01
       (section_functor
          (ColimFf CC dbase v0) f)) =
(pr12 Lv)
  (three_mor01
     (section_functor (dob dbase v) f))
· # (fact_L (pr1 Lv) ∙ fact_L (pr1 Lv))
    mor
(λ v : vertex g,
 let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
 let LvinFinf :=
   three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
 let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
 three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf) v
· colimIn
    (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase (fact_L (colim Finf) f)) v =
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# (pr1 Lv) (# (fact_L (pr1 Lv)) mor))
   · pr1
       (# (pr1 Lv)
          (three_mor_mor01
             (section_nat_trans_data
                (colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H)
                (fact_L (colim Finf) f)))))

  reflexivity.
Qed.


C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
three_mor11
  (# (pr1 (dob d v))
     (three_mor_mor01
        (section_nat_trans (colimIn Finf v) f)))
· three_mor12 (pr1 (dob d v) (fact_L (colim Finf) f)) =
three_mor12 (pr1 (dob d v) (fact_L (pr1 (dob d v)) f))
· colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
Lcin:= # (pr1 Lv)
  (three_mor_mor01
     (section_nat_trans (colimIn Finf v) f)): three C
⟦ pr1 Lv
    (three_mor01
       (section_functor (dob dbase v) f)),
pr1 Lv
  (three_mor01 (section_functor (colim Finf) f))
⟧
three_mor11 Lcin
· three_mor12 (pr1 Lv (fact_L (colim Finf) f)) =
three_mor12 (pr1 Lv (fact_L (pr1 Lv) f))
· colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
Lcin:= # (pr1 Lv)
  (three_mor_mor01
     (section_nat_trans (colimIn Finf v) f)): three C
⟦ pr1 Lv
    (three_mor01
       (section_functor (dob dbase v) f)),
pr1 Lv
  (three_mor01 (section_functor (colim Finf) f))
⟧
comm12:= pr2 (three_mor_comm Lcin): (λ _ : pr122 (pr1 Lv
                (three_mor01
                   (section_functor
                      (dob dbase v) f)))
       · pr12 Lcin =
       pr111 Lcin
       · pr122 (pr1 Lv
                  (three_mor01
                     (section_functor
                        (colim Finf) f))),
 pr122 (pr2
          (pr1 Lv
             (three_mor01
                (section_functor
                   (dob dbase v) f))))
 · pr211 Lcin =
 pr12 Lcin
 · pr122 (pr2
            (pr1 Lv
               (three_mor01
                  (section_functor
                     (colim Finf) f)))))
  (pr1 (three_mor_comm Lcin))
three_mor11 Lcin
· three_mor12 (pr1 Lv (fact_L (colim Finf) f)) =
three_mor12 (pr1 Lv (fact_L (pr1 Lv) f))
· colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
Lv:= dob d v: total_category (LNWFS C)
Lcin:= # (pr1 Lv)
  (three_mor_mor01
     (section_nat_trans (colimIn Finf v) f)): three C
⟦ pr1 Lv
    (three_mor01
       (section_functor (dob dbase v) f)),
pr1 Lv
  (three_mor01 (section_functor (colim Finf) f))
⟧
comm12:= pr2 (three_mor_comm Lcin): (λ _ : pr122 (pr1 Lv
                (three_mor01
                   (section_functor
                      (dob dbase v) f)))
       · pr12 Lcin =
       pr111 Lcin
       · pr122 (pr1 Lv
                  (three_mor01
                     (section_functor
                        (colim Finf) f))),
 pr122 (pr2
          (pr1 Lv
             (three_mor01
                (section_functor
                   (dob dbase v) f))))
 · pr211 Lcin =
 pr12 Lcin
 · pr122 (pr2
            (pr1 Lv
               (three_mor01
                  (section_functor
                     (colim Finf) f)))))
  (pr1 (three_mor_comm Lcin))
three_mor12 (pr1 Lv (fact_L (pr1 Lv) f))
· colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v =
three_mor11 Lcin
· three_mor12 (pr1 Lv (fact_L (colim Finf) f))

  exact comm12.
Qed.


C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
disp_Comonad_laws
  (L_monad_data (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul)

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))

dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
disp_δ (L_monad_data (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul) f
· disp_ε (L_monad_data (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul)
    (fact_L (colim Finf) f) =
identity (fact_L (colim Finf) f)

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))

?b = colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase (fact_L (colim Finf) f))
  v
· pr21 (disp_ε
          (L_monad_data (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul)
          (fact_L (colim Finf) f)) = ?f'

v: vertex g

· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf) · 
?f' = colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v

dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
disp_δ (L_monad_data (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul) f
· # (fact_L (colim Finf))
    (disp_ε
       (L_monad_data (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul) f) =
identity (fact_L (colim Finf) f)

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
ccmor:= CC g
  (mapdiagram
     (PrecategoryBinProduct.pr2_functor C C)
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
        (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f))): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (PrecategoryBinProduct.pr2_functor C C)
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
        (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f)))
colimIn ccmor v
· pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f) = ?f'

      apply (colimOfArrowsIn _ _ ccmor).
    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· ((λ v : vertex g,
    let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
    let LvinFinf :=
      three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
    let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
    three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf) v
   · colimIn
       (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase (fact_L (colim Finf) f))
       v)
· pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf))
          (disp_ε
             (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
                LNWFS_colim_comul) f)) =
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v

    (* cbn.  *)

          (disp_ε
             (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
                LNWFS_colim_comul) f)) =
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph

v: vertex g

   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· colimIn
    (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase (fact_L (colim Finf) f)) v
· pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf))
          (disp_ε
             (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
                LNWFS_colim_comul) f)) = ?b

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
ccmor:= CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase
  (make_dirprod
     (three_ob0 (f,, ColimFf_ob CC dbase v0 f))
     (colim (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f)),,
   pr12 ((pr11 (dob d v0)) f)
   · colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v0): ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 dbase
     (make_dirprod
        (three_ob0
           (f,, ColimFf_ob CC dbase v0 f))
        (colim (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f)),,
      pr12 ((pr11 (dob d v0)) f)
      · colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v0))
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase (fact_L (colim Finf) f))
  v
· pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf))
          (disp_ε
             (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
                LNWFS_colim_comul) f)) = ?f'

      apply (colimOfArrowsIn _ _ ccmor).

g: graph

f: arrow C
v: vertex g

· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· ((λ v : vertex g,
    let Dv := dob dbase v in
    pr1
      (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
         (disp_ε
            (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
               LNWFS_colim_comul) f))) v
   · colimIn
       (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase
          (functor_identity (arrow C) f)) v) =
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v

· # (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) 
       (pr12 (dob d v)) (pr22 (dob d v)))
    (ε
       (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v))
          (pr12 (dob d v)) 
          (pr22 (dob d v))) f) =
identity
  (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) 
     (pr12 (dob d v)) (pr22 (dob d v)) f)
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· (let Dv := dob dbase v in
   pr1
     (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
        (disp_ε
           (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
              LNWFS_colim_comul) f))) =
pr21 (δ
        (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) (pr12 (dob d v))
           (pr22 (dob d v))) f)
· pr21 (# (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) (pr12 (dob d v))
             (pr22 (dob d v)))
          (ε
             (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) (pr12 (dob d v))
                (pr22 (dob d v))) f))

CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))

v0: vertex g

Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
law2v:= Comonad_law2 f: δ
  (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) 
     (pr12 (dob d v)) (pr22 (dob d v))) f
· # (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) 
       (pr12 (dob d v)) (pr22 (dob d v)))
    (ε
       (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v))
          (pr12 (dob d v)) 
          (pr22 (dob d v))) f) =
identity
  (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) 
     (pr12 (dob d v)) (pr22 (dob d v)) f)
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (dob dbase v)
     (pr1
        (# (pr1 (dob d v))
           (three_mor_mor01
              (section_nat_trans (colimIn Finf v) f)))
      · disp_ε
          (L_monad_data (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul)
          f)) =
pr21 (# (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) (pr12 (dob d v))
           (pr22 (dob d v)))
        (ε
           (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) (pr12 (dob d v))
              (pr22 (dob d v))) f))

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g

dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
law2v:= Comonad_law2 f: δ
  (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) 
     (pr12 (dob d v)) (pr22 (dob d v))) f
· # (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) 
       (pr12 (dob d v)) (pr22 (dob d v)))
    (ε
       (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v))
          (pr12 (dob d v)) 
          (pr22 (dob d v))) f) =
identity
  (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) 
     (pr12 (dob d v)) (pr22 (dob d v)) f)
arrow_mor11
  (pr1
     (# (pr1 (dob d v))
        (three_mor_mor01
           (section_nat_trans (colimIn Finf v) f)))
   · disp_ε
       (L_monad_data (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul) f) =
arrow_mor11
  (pr1
     (# (pr1 (dob d v))
        (ε
           (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) (pr12 (dob d v))
              (pr22 (dob d v))) f)))

    apply (colimArrowCommutes (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f)).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
disp_δ (L_monad_data (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul) f
· # (fact_L (colim Finf))
    (disp_δ
       (L_monad_data (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul) f) =
disp_δ (L_monad_data (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul) f
· disp_δ (L_monad_data (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul)
    (fact_L (colim Finf) f)

dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v
· pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_first_mor f)
· pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f)
· pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf))
          (disp_δ
             (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
                LNWFS_colim_comul) f)) =
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v
· arrow_mor11
    (disp_δ
       (L_monad_data (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul) f
     · disp_δ
         (L_monad_data (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul)
         (fact_L (colim Finf) f))

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))

v0: vertex g

Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
(λ v : vertex g,
 let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
 let LvinFinf :=
   three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
 let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
 three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf) v
· colimIn
    (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase (fact_L (colim Finf) f)) v
· pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf))
          (disp_δ
             (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
                LNWFS_colim_comul) f)) = ?f'

Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
(let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
 let LvinFinf :=
   three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
 let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
 three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)

f: arrow C
v: vertex g
(let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
 let LvinFinf :=
   three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
 let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
 three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· (colimIn
     (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase (fact_L (colim Finf) f)) v
   · pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf))
             (disp_δ
                (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
                   LNWFS_colim_comul) f))) = ?f'

      
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase (fact_L (colim Finf) f))
  v
· pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf))
          (disp_δ
             (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
                LNWFS_colim_comul) f)) = ?f'

      
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
ccinf:= CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase (fact_L (colim Finf) f): ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 dbase
     (fact_L (colim Finf) f))
colimIn ccinf v
· pr21 (# (fact_L (colim Finf))
          (disp_δ
             (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
                LNWFS_colim_comul) f)) = ?f'

      apply (colimArrowCommutes ccinf).
    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· ((let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
    let LvinFinf :=
      three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
    let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
    three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
   · coconeIn
       (make_cocone
          (λ u : vertex g,
           (λ v : vertex g,
            let Dv := dob dbase v in
            pr1
              (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
                 (disp_δ
                    (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
                       LNWFS_colim_comul) f))) u
           · colimIn
               (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase
                  ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                    ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f)) u)
          (colimOfArrows_subproof C g
             (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 dbase
                (fact_L (colim Finf) f))
             (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 dbase
                ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                  ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f))
             (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase
                ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                  ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f))
             (λ v : vertex g,
              let Dv := dob dbase v in
              pr1
                (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
                   (disp_δ
                      (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
                         LNWFS_colim_comul) f)))
             (λ (u v : vertex g) (e : edge u v),
              ColimFf_mor_subproof dbase
                (fact_L (colim Finf) f)
                ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                  ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f)
                (disp_δ
                   (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
                      LNWFS_colim_comul) f) u v e))) v) =
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v
· arrow_mor11
    (disp_δ
       (L_monad_data (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul) f
     · disp_δ
         (L_monad_data (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul)
         (fact_L (colim Finf) f))

CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))

v0: vertex g

Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v
· arrow_mor11
    (disp_δ
       (L_monad_data (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul) f
     · disp_δ
         (L_monad_data (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul)
         (fact_L (colim Finf) f)) =

· ((let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
    let LvinFinf :=
      three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
    let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
    three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
   · coconeIn
       (make_cocone
          (λ u : vertex g,
           (let Dv := dob dbase u in
            pr1
              (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
                 (disp_δ
                    (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
                       LNWFS_colim_comul) f)))
           · colimIn
               (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase
                  ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                    ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f)) u)
          (colimOfArrows_subproof C g
             (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 dbase
                (fact_L (colim Finf) f))
             (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 dbase
                ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                  ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f))
             (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase
                ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                  ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f))
             (λ v : vertex g,
              let Dv := dob dbase v in
              pr1
                (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
                   (disp_δ
                      (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
                         LNWFS_colim_comul) f)))
             (λ (u v : vertex g) (e : edge u v),
              ColimFf_mor_subproof dbase
                (fact_L (colim Finf) f)
                ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                  ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f)
                (disp_δ
                   (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
                      LNWFS_colim_comul) f) u v e))) v)

    (* cbn. *)

CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g

    let LvinFinf :=
      three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
    let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
    three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
   · coconeIn

          (λ u : vertex g,
           (let Dv := dob dbase u in
            pr1
              (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
                 (disp_δ
                    (L_monad_data 
                       (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul)
                    f)))

                    ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f)) u)
          (colimOfArrows_subproof C g
             (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 dbase
                (fact_L (colim Finf) f))
             (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 dbase
                ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                  ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f))

                  ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f))

                  ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f)
                (disp_δ
                   (L_monad_data 
                      (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul)
                   f) u v e))) v)

              let Dv := dob dbase v in
              pr1
                (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
                   (disp_δ
                      (L_monad_data 
                        (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul)
                      f)))
             (λ (u v : vertex g) 
              (e : edge u v),
              ColimFf_mor_subproof dbase
                (fact_L (colim Finf) f)
                ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                  ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f)
                (disp_δ
                   (L_monad_data 
                      (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul)
                   f) u v e))) v)
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v
· pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_first_mor f) = ?f'
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
?f' · pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f)
· pr21 (disp_δ
          (L_monad_data (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul)
          (fact_L (colim Finf) f)) =
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· ((let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
    let LvinFinf :=
      three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
    let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
    three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
   · coconeIn
       (make_cocone
          (λ u : vertex g,
           (let Dv := dob dbase u in
            pr1
              (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
                 (disp_δ
                    (L_monad_data 
                       (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul)
                    f)))
           · colimIn
               (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase
                  ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                    ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f)) u)
          (colimOfArrows_subproof C g
             (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 dbase
                (fact_L (colim Finf) f))
             (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 dbase
                ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                  ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f))
             (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase
                ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                  ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f))
             (λ v : vertex g,
              let Dv := dob dbase v in
              pr1
                (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
                   (disp_δ
                      (L_monad_data 
                        (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul)
                      f)))
             (λ (u v : vertex g) 
              (e : edge u v),
              ColimFf_mor_subproof dbase
                (fact_L (colim Finf) f)
                ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                  ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f)
                (disp_δ
                   (L_monad_data 
                      (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul)
                   f) u v e))) v)

            
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
(λ x : vertex g,
 pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) x)) v
· colimIn
    (CC g
       (mapdiagram
          (PrecategoryBinProduct.pr2_functor C C)
          (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
             (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f))))
    v · pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f)
· pr21 (disp_δ
          (L_monad_data (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul)
          (fact_L (colim Finf) f)) =
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· ((let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
    let LvinFinf :=
      three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
    let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
    three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
   · coconeIn
       (make_cocone
          (λ u : vertex g,
           (let Dv := dob dbase u in
            pr1
              (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
                 (disp_δ
                    (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
                       LNWFS_colim_comul) f)))
           · colimIn
               (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase
                  ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                    ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f)) u)
          (colimOfArrows_subproof C g
             (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 dbase
                (fact_L (colim Finf) f))
             (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 dbase
                ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                  ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f))
             (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase
                ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                  ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f))
             (λ v : vertex g,
              let Dv := dob dbase v in
              pr1
                (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
                   (disp_δ
                      (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
                         LNWFS_colim_comul) f)))
             (λ (u v : vertex g) (e : edge u v),
              ColimFf_mor_subproof dbase
                (fact_L (colim Finf) f)
                ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                  ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f)
                (disp_δ
                   (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
                      LNWFS_colim_comul) f) u v e))) v)
