             (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 dbase
                ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                  ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f))
             (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase
                ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                  ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f))
             (λ v : vertex g,
              let Dv := dob dbase v in
              pr1
                (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
                   (disp_δ
                      (L_monad_data 
                        (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul)
                      f)))
             (λ (u v : vertex g) 
              (e : edge u v),
              ColimFf_mor_subproof dbase
                (fact_L (colim Finf) f)
                ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                  ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f)
                (disp_δ
                   (L_monad_data 
                      (colim Finf) LNWFS_colim_comul)
                   f) u v e))) v)

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
colimIn
  (CC g
     (mapdiagram
        (PrecategoryBinProduct.pr2_functor C C)
        (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
           (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f)))) v
· (pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f)
   · pr21 (disp_δ
             (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
                LNWFS_colim_comul)
             (fact_L (colim Finf) f))) = ?f'

(λ v : vertex g,

   three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in

ccinf:= CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase (fact_L (colim Finf) f): ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 dbase
     (fact_L (colim Finf) f))

        (PrecategoryBinProduct.pr2_functor C C)
        (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
           (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor
              (fact_L (colim Finf) f))))) v
· pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor
          (fact_L (colim Finf) f)) = ?f'

      apply (colimOfArrowsIn).
    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· ((let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
    let LvinFinf :=
      three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
    let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
    three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
   · (pr2
        (pr1
           (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor
              (fact_L (colim Finf) f)) v)
      · ((λ v : vertex g,
          let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
          let LvinFinf :=
            three_mor_mor01
              (section_nat_trans vinFinf
                 (fact_L (colim Finf) f)) in
          let dobvLvinFinf :=
            # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
          three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf) v
         · colimIn
             (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase
                (fact_L (colim Finf)
                   (fact_L (colim Finf) f))) v))) =
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· ((let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
    let LvinFinf :=
      three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
    let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
    three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
   · coconeIn
       (make_cocone
          (λ u : vertex g,
           (let Dv := dob dbase u in
            pr1
              (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
                 (disp_δ
                    (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
                       LNWFS_colim_comul) f)))
           · colimIn
               (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase
                  ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                    ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f)) u)
          (colimOfArrows_subproof C g
             (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 dbase
                (fact_L (colim Finf) f))
             (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 dbase
                ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                  ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f))
             (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase
                ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                  ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f))
             (λ v : vertex g,
              let Dv := dob dbase v in
              pr1
                (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
                   (disp_δ
                      (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
                         LNWFS_colim_comul) f)))
             (λ (u v : vertex g) (e : edge u v),
              ColimFf_mor_subproof dbase
                (fact_L (colim Finf) f)
                ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                  ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f)
                (disp_δ
                   (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
                      LNWFS_colim_comul) f) u v e))) v)

                      LNWFS_colim_comul) f) u v e))) v)

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· ((let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
    let LvinFinf :=
      three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
    let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
    three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
   · coconeIn
       (make_cocone
          (λ u : vertex g,
           (let Dv := dob dbase u in
            pr1
              (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
                 (disp_δ
                    (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
                       LNWFS_colim_comul) f)))
           · colimIn
               (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase
                  ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                    ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f)) u)
          (colimOfArrows_subproof C g
             (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 dbase
                (fact_L (colim Finf) f))
             (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 dbase
                ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                  ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f))
             (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase
                ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                  ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f))
             (λ v : vertex g,
              let Dv := dob dbase v in
              pr1
                (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
                   (disp_δ
                      (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
                         LNWFS_colim_comul) f)))
             (λ (u v : vertex g) (e : edge u v),
              ColimFf_mor_subproof dbase
                (fact_L (colim Finf) f)
                ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                  ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f)
                (disp_δ
                   (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
                      LNWFS_colim_comul) f) u v e))) v) =
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· pr2
    (pr1
       (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor
          (fact_L (colim Finf) f)) v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01
       (section_nat_trans vinFinf
          (fact_L (colim Finf) f)) in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· colimIn
    (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase
       (fact_L (colim Finf) (fact_L (colim Finf) f)))
    v

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· ((let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
    let LvinFinf :=
      three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
    let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
    three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
   · coconeIn
       (make_cocone
          (λ u : vertex g,
           (let Dv := dob dbase u in
            pr1
              (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
                 (disp_δ
                    (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
                       LNWFS_colim_comul) f)))
           · colimIn
               (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase
                  ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                    ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f)) u)
          (colimOfArrows_subproof C g
             (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 dbase
                (fact_L (colim Finf) f))
             (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 dbase
                ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                  ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f))
             (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase
                ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                  ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f))
             (λ v : vertex g,
              let Dv := dob dbase v in
              pr1
                (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
                   (disp_δ
                      (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
                         LNWFS_colim_comul) f)))
             (λ (u v : vertex g) (e : edge u v),
              ColimFf_mor_subproof dbase
                (fact_L (colim Finf) f)
                ((fact_L (colim Finf)
                  ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f)
                (disp_δ
                   (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
                      LNWFS_colim_comul) f) u v e))) v) =
?b

g: graph

Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· (let Dv := dob dbase v in
   pr1
     (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
        (disp_δ
           (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
              LNWFS_colim_comul) f)))
· colimIn
    (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase
       ((fact_L (colim Finf) ∙ fact_L (colim Finf)) f))
    v =
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in

          (fact_L (colim Finf) f)) v)

   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01
       (section_nat_trans vinFinf
          (fact_L (colim Finf) f)) in

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· (let Dv := dob dbase v in
   pr1
     (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
        (disp_δ
           (L_monad_data (colim Finf)
              LNWFS_colim_comul) f))) =
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· pr2
    (pr1
       (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor
          (fact_L (colim Finf) f)) v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01
       (section_nat_trans vinFinf
          (fact_L (colim Finf) f)) in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)

    exact (LNWFS_colim_comul_monad_ax_subproof f v).
Qed.

Definition ColimLNWFS_disp : LNWFS C (colim Finf) :=
    (LNWFS_colim_comul,, LNWFS_colim_comul_monad_ax).

Definition ColimLNWFS : total_category (LNWFS C) :=
    (_,, ColimLNWFS_disp).


C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
pr2 (dob d v) -->[ colimIn Finf v] ColimLNWFS_disp


C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
pr2 (dob d v) -->[ colimIn Finf v] ColimLNWFS_disp

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
f: arrow C
pr11 (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) ColimLNWFS_disp
        (colimIn Finf v) f)
· pr11 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data ColimLNWFS_disp) f) =
pr11 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (pr2 (dob d v))) f
      · # (pr1
             (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) (pr12 (dob d v))
                (pr22 (dob d v))))
          (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) ColimLNWFS_disp
             (colimIn Finf v) f))
· pr11 (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) ColimLNWFS_disp
          (colimIn Finf v)
          (pr1
             (L_monad (colim Finf)
                (pr1 ColimLNWFS_disp)
                (pr2 ColimLNWFS_disp)) f))
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
f: arrow C
pr21 (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) ColimLNWFS_disp
        (colimIn Finf v) f)
· pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data ColimLNWFS_disp) f) =
pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (pr2 (dob d v))) f
      · # (pr1
             (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) 
                (pr12 (dob d v)) 
                (pr22 (dob d v))))
          (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) ColimLNWFS_disp
             (colimIn Finf v) f))
· pr21 (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) ColimLNWFS_disp
          (colimIn Finf v)
          (pr1
             (L_monad (colim Finf)
                (pr1 ColimLNWFS_disp)
                (pr2 ColimLNWFS_disp)) f))
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
f: arrow C
pr11 (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) ColimLNWFS_disp
        (colimIn Finf v) f)
· pr11 (disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data ColimLNWFS_disp) f) =
identity
  (pr1
     (make_dirprod (three_ob0 (pr1 (pr1 (dob d v)) f))
        (three_ob1 (pr1 (pr1 (dob d v)) f))))
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)

v: vertex g
f: arrow C
pr21 (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) ColimLNWFS_disp
        (colimIn Finf v) f)
· pr21 (disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data ColimLNWFS_disp) f) =
three_mor12 (pr1 (pr1 (dob d v)) f)

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))

        (colimIn Finf v) f)
· pr11 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data ColimLNWFS_disp) f) =

      · # (pr1
             (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) (pr12 (dob d v))
                (pr22 (dob d v))))
          (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) ColimLNWFS_disp
             (colimIn Finf v) f))

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
f: arrow C
pr11 (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) ColimLNWFS_disp
        (colimIn Finf v) f)
· pr11 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data ColimLNWFS_disp) f) =
?b
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
f: arrow C
?b =
pr11 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (pr2 (dob d v))) f
      · # (pr1
             (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) 
                (pr12 (dob d v)) 
                (pr22 (dob d v))))
          (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) ColimLNWFS_disp
             (colimIn Finf v) f))
· pr11 (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) ColimLNWFS_disp
          (colimIn Finf v)
          (pr1
             (L_monad (colim Finf)
                (pr1 ColimLNWFS_disp)
                (pr2 ColimLNWFS_disp)) f))

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d

v: vertex g
f: arrow C
?f' · pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f) =
pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (pr2 (dob d v))) f
      · # (pr1
             (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) 
                (pr12 (dob d v)) 
                (pr22 (dob d v))))
          (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) ColimLNWFS_disp

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
f: arrow C
(λ x : vertex g,
 pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) x)) v
· colimIn
    (CC g
       (mapdiagram
          (PrecategoryBinProduct.pr2_functor C C)
          (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
             (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f))))
    v · pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f) =
pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (pr2 (dob d v))) f
      · # (pr1
             (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) (pr12 (dob d v))
                (pr22 (dob d v))))
          (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) ColimLNWFS_disp
             (colimIn Finf v) f))
· pr21 (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) ColimLNWFS_disp
          (colimIn Finf v)
          (pr1
             (L_monad (colim Finf)
                (pr1 ColimLNWFS_disp)
                (pr2 ColimLNWFS_disp)) f))

Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase

Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
f: arrow C
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· (colimIn
     (CC g
        (mapdiagram
           (PrecategoryBinProduct.pr2_functor C C)
           (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
              (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f))))
     v · pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f)) =
?b
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
f: arrow C
?b =
pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (pr2 (dob d v))) f
      · # (pr1
             (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) 
                (pr12 (dob d v)) 
                (pr22 (dob d v))))
          (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) ColimLNWFS_disp
             (colimIn Finf v) f))
· pr21 (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) ColimLNWFS_disp
          (colimIn Finf v)
          (pr1
             (L_monad (colim Finf)
                (pr1 ColimLNWFS_disp)
                (pr2 ColimLNWFS_disp)) f))
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
f: arrow C
colimIn
  (CC g
     (mapdiagram
        (PrecategoryBinProduct.pr2_functor C C)
        (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
           (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f)))) v
· pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f) = ?f'
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
f: arrow C
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· ?f' =
pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (pr2 (dob d v))) f
      · # (pr1
             (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) 
                (pr12 (dob d v)) 
                (pr22 (dob d v))))
          (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) ColimLNWFS_disp
             (colimIn Finf v) f))
· pr21 (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) ColimLNWFS_disp
          (colimIn Finf v)
          (pr1
             (L_monad (colim Finf)
                (pr1 ColimLNWFS_disp)
                (pr2 ColimLNWFS_disp)) f))

            
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
f: arrow C
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· ((λ v : vertex g,
    let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
    let LvinFinf :=
      three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
    let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
    three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf) v
   · colimIn
       (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase (fact_L (colim Finf) f))
       v) =
pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (pr2 (dob d v))) f
      · # (pr1
             (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) (pr12 (dob d v))
                (pr22 (dob d v))))
          (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) ColimLNWFS_disp
             (colimIn Finf v) f))
· pr21 (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) ColimLNWFS_disp
          (colimIn Finf v)
          (pr1
             (L_monad (colim Finf)
                (pr1 ColimLNWFS_disp)
                (pr2 ColimLNWFS_disp)) f))

dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
f: arrow C
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· ((let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
    let LvinFinf :=
      three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
    let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
    three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
   · colimIn
       (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase (fact_L (colim Finf) f))
       v) = ?b

g: graph

dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
f: arrow C
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· colimIn
    (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase (fact_L (colim Finf) f)) v =

      · # (pr1
             (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) (pr12 (dob d v))
                (pr22 (dob d v))))

                (pr1 ColimLNWFS_disp)

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
f: arrow C
pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (pr2 (dob d v))) f
      · # (pr1
             (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) (pr12 (dob d v))
                (pr22 (dob d v))))
          (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) ColimLNWFS_disp
             (colimIn Finf v) f))
· pr21 (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) ColimLNWFS_disp
          (colimIn Finf v)
          (pr1
             (L_monad (colim Finf)
                (pr1 ColimLNWFS_disp)
                (pr2 ColimLNWFS_disp)) f)) =
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· colimIn
    (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase (fact_L (colim Finf) f)) v

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
f: arrow C
pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (pr2 (dob d v))) f
      · # (pr1
             (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) (pr12 (dob d v))
                (pr22 (dob d v))))
          (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) ColimLNWFS_disp
             (colimIn Finf v) f)) =
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
   let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
f: arrow C
pr21 (# (pr1
           (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) (pr12 (dob d v))
              (pr22 (dob d v))))
        (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) ColimLNWFS_disp
           (colimIn Finf v) f)) =
(let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
 let LvinFinf :=
   three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
 let dobvLvinFinf := # (pr1 (dob d v)) LvinFinf in
 three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)

    apply section_disp_on_eq_morphisms; reflexivity.
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
f: arrow C
pr11 (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) ColimLNWFS_disp
        (colimIn Finf v) f)
· pr11 (disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data ColimLNWFS_disp) f) =
identity
  (pr1
     (make_dirprod (three_ob0 (pr1 (pr1 (dob d v)) f))
        (three_ob1 (pr1 (pr1 (dob d v)) f))))
 apply id_left.
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
f: arrow C
pr21 (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) ColimLNWFS_disp
        (colimIn Finf v) f)
· pr21 (disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data ColimLNWFS_disp) f) =
three_mor12 (pr1 (pr1 (dob d v)) f)
 apply (colimArrowCommutes (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f)).
Qed.

Definition ColimLNWFS_in (v : vertex g) :
    dob d v --> ColimLNWFS :=
  (colimIn Finf v,, ColimLNWFS_disp_in v).

Local Open Scope mor_disp.


C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
cocone dbase (pr1 L)


C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
cocone dbase (pr1 L)

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
∏ v : vertex g, Ff C ⟦ dob dbase v, pr1 L ⟧
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
forms_cocone dbase ?f

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
∏ v : vertex g, Ff C ⟦ dob dbase v, pr1 L ⟧
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
v: vertex g
Ff C ⟦ dob dbase v, pr1 L ⟧

    exact (pr1 (coconeIn cc v)).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
forms_cocone dbase
  (λ v : vertex g, pr1 (coconeIn cc v))
 abstract (
      intros u v e;
      exact (base_paths _ _ (coconeInCommutes cc _ _ e))
    ).
Defined.


C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
ColimLNWFS_disp -->[
ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
  (project_cocone L cc)] pr2 L


C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
ColimLNWFS_disp -->[
ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
  (project_cocone L cc)] pr2 L

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
f: arrow C
lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
  (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
     (project_cocone L cc)) f
· disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (pr2 L)) f =
disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data ColimLNWFS_disp) f
· (# (pr1
        (L_monad (colim Finf) (pr1 ColimLNWFS_disp)
           (pr2 ColimLNWFS_disp))))%cat
    (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
       (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
          (project_cocone L cc)) f)
· lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
    (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
       (project_cocone L cc))
    (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L)) f)
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
f: arrow C
lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp 
  (pr2 L)
  (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 
     (pr1 L) (project_cocone L cc)) f
· disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data (pr2 L)) f =
disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data ColimLNWFS_disp) f

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
f: arrow C
lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
  (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
     (project_cocone L cc)) f
· disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (pr2 L)) f =
disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data ColimLNWFS_disp) f
· (# (pr1
        (L_monad (colim Finf) (pr1 ColimLNWFS_disp)
           (pr2 ColimLNWFS_disp))))%cat
    (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
       (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
          (project_cocone L cc)) f)
· lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
    (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
       (project_cocone L cc))
    (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L)) f)
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
f: arrow C
pr1
  (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
     (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
        (project_cocone L cc)) f
   · disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (pr2 L)) f) =
pr1
  (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data ColimLNWFS_disp) f
   · (# (pr1
           (L_monad (colim Finf) (pr1 ColimLNWFS_disp)
              (pr2 ColimLNWFS_disp))))%cat
       (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
          (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
             (project_cocone L cc)) f)
   · lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
       (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
          (project_cocone L cc))
       (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L)) f))

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
f: arrow C
pr11 (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
        (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
           (project_cocone L cc)) f)
· pr11 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (pr2 L)) f) =
pr11 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data ColimLNWFS_disp) f
      · (# (pr1
              (L_monad (colim Finf)
                 (pr1 ColimLNWFS_disp)
                 (pr2 ColimLNWFS_disp))))%cat
          (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
             (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
                (project_cocone L cc)) f))
· pr11 (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
          (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
             (project_cocone L cc))
          (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L)) f))

v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
f: arrow C
pr21 (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
        (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
           (project_cocone L cc)) f)
· pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (pr2 L)) f) =
pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data ColimLNWFS_disp) f
      · (# (pr1
              (L_monad (colim Finf)
                 (pr1 ColimLNWFS_disp)
                 (pr2 ColimLNWFS_disp))))%cat
          (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
             (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
                (project_cocone L cc)) f))
· pr21 (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
          (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
             (project_cocone L cc))
          (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L)) f))
 
C: category

g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
f: arrow C
∏ u : vertex g,
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) u
· (pr21 (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
           (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
              (project_cocone L cc)) f)
   · pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (pr2 L)) f)) =
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) u
· (pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data ColimLNWFS_disp) f
         · (# (pr1
                 (L_monad (colim Finf)
                    (pr1 ColimLNWFS_disp)
                    (pr2 ColimLNWFS_disp))))%cat
             (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
                (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0
                   (pr1 L) (project_cocone L cc)) f))
   · pr21 (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
             (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
                (project_cocone L cc))
             (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L))
                f)))

dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
colimIn (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase f) v
· pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data ColimLNWFS_disp) f)
· pr21 ((# (pr1
              (L_monad (colim Finf)
                 (pr1 ColimLNWFS_disp)
                 (pr2 ColimLNWFS_disp))))%cat
          (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
             (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
                (project_cocone L cc)) f))
· pr21 (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
          (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
             (project_cocone L cc))
          (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L)) f)) =
?b

g: graph

f: arrow C
v: vertex g
(λ x : vertex g,
 pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) x)) v
· colimIn
    (CC g
       (mapdiagram
          (PrecategoryBinProduct.pr2_functor C C)
          (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
             (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f))))
    v · pr21 (LNWFS_colim_comul_data_second_mor f)
· pr21 ((# (pr1
              (L_monad (colim Finf)
                 (pr1 ColimLNWFS_disp)
                 (pr2 ColimLNWFS_disp))))%cat
          (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)

                (project_cocone L cc)) f))

          (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
             (project_cocone L cc))
          (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L)) f)) =
coconeIn
  (cocone_pointwise dbase (pr1 L)
     (project_cocone L cc) f) v
· pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (pr2 L)) f)

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· coconeIn
    (make_cocone
       (λ u : vertex g,
        (λ v : vertex g,
         let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
         let LvinFinf :=
           three_mor_mor01
             (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
         let dobvLvinFinf :=
           (# (pr1 (dob d v)))%cat LvinFinf in
         three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf) u
        · colimIn
            (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase
               (fact_L (colim Finf) f)) u)
       (colimOfArrows_subproof C g
          (mapdiagram
             (PrecategoryBinProduct.pr2_functor C C)
             (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f)))
          (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 dbase
             (fact_L (colim Finf) f))
          (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase
             (fact_L (colim Finf) f))
          (λ v : vertex g,
           let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
           let LvinFinf :=
             three_mor_mor01
               (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
           let dobvLvinFinf :=
             (# (pr1 (dob d v)))%cat LvinFinf in
           three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
          (ccμ_cod_preservation_mor_subproof f))) v
· (pr21 ((# (pr1
               (L_monad (colim Finf)
                  (pr1 ColimLNWFS_disp)
                  (pr2 ColimLNWFS_disp))))%cat
           (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
              (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
                 (project_cocone L cc)) f))
   · pr21 (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
             (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
                (project_cocone L cc))
             (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L))
                f))) =
coconeIn
  (cocone_pointwise dbase (pr1 L)
     (project_cocone L cc) f) v
· pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (pr2 L)) f)

      
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· coconeIn
    (make_cocone
       (λ u : vertex g,
        (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf u in
         let LvinFinf :=
           three_mor_mor01
             (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
         let dobvLvinFinf :=
           (# (pr1 (dob d u)))%cat LvinFinf in
         three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
        · colimIn
            (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase
               (fact_L (colim Finf) f)) u)
       (colimOfArrows_subproof C g
          (mapdiagram
             (PrecategoryBinProduct.pr2_functor C C)
             (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f)))
          (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 dbase
             (fact_L (colim Finf) f))
          (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase
             (fact_L (colim Finf) f))
          (λ v : vertex g,
           let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
           let LvinFinf :=
             three_mor_mor01
               (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
           let dobvLvinFinf :=
             (# (pr1 (dob d v)))%cat LvinFinf in
           three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
          (ccμ_cod_preservation_mor_subproof f))) v
· (pr21 ((# (pr1
               (L_monad (colim Finf)
                  (pr1 ColimLNWFS_disp)
                  (pr2 ColimLNWFS_disp))))%cat
           (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
              (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
                 (project_cocone L cc)) f))
   · pr21 (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
             (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
                (project_cocone L cc))
             (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L))
                f))) = ?b
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
?b =
coconeIn
  (cocone_pointwise dbase 
     (pr1 L) (project_cocone L cc) f) v
· pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (pr2 L)) f)

   let LvinFinf :=

L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
(λ v : vertex g,
 let Dv := dob dbase v in
 pr1
   (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
      (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
         (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
            (project_cocone L cc)) f))) v
· colimIn
    (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase
       (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L)) f)) v
· pr21 (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
          (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
             (project_cocone L cc))
          (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L)) f)) =
?f'

        
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
(let Dv := dob dbase v in
 pr1
   (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
      (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
         (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
            (project_cocone L cc)) f)))
· colimIn
    (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase
       (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L)) f)) v
· pr21 (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
          (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
             (project_cocone L cc))
          (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L)) f)) =
?b
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase

cc: cocone d L
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
?b = ?f'

Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase

cc: cocone d L
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
(let Dv := dob dbase v in
 pr1
   (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
      (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
         (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
            (project_cocone L cc)) f)))
· (colimIn
     (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase
        (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L)) f)) v
   · pr21 (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
             (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
                (project_cocone L cc))
             (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L))
                f))) = ?f'

        
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
colimIn
  (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC dbase
     (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L)) f)) v
· pr21 (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
          (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
             (project_cocone L cc))
          (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L)) f)) =
?f'

        apply colimArrowCommutes.
      
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
   let dobvLvinFinf :=
     (# (pr1 (dob d v)))%cat LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· ((let Dv := dob dbase v in
    pr1
      (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
         (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
            (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
               (project_cocone L cc)) f)))
   · coconeIn
       (cocone_pointwise dbase (pr1 L)
          (project_cocone L cc)
          (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L)) f))
       v) =
coconeIn
  (cocone_pointwise dbase (pr1 L)
     (project_cocone L cc) f) v
· pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (pr2 L)) f)


      
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
coconeIn
  (cocone_pointwise dbase (pr1 L)
     (project_cocone L cc) f) v
· pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (pr2 L)) f) =
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
   let dobvLvinFinf :=
     (# (pr1 (dob d v)))%cat LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· ((let Dv := dob dbase v in
    pr1
      (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
         (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
            (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
               (project_cocone L cc)) f)))
   · coconeIn
       (cocone_pointwise dbase (pr1 L)
          (project_cocone L cc)
          (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L)) f))
       v)

      
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
coconeIn
  (cocone_pointwise dbase (pr1 L)
     (project_cocone L cc) f) v
· pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (pr2 L)) f) = ?b
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
?b =
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
   let dobvLvinFinf :=
     (# (pr1 (dob d v)))%cat LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· ((let Dv := dob dbase v in
    pr1
      (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
         (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp 
            (pr2 L)
            (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 
               (pr1 L) (project_cocone L cc)) f)))
   · coconeIn
       (cocone_pointwise dbase 
          (pr1 L) (project_cocone L cc)
          (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L)) f))
       v)
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (pr2 (dob d v))) f
      · (# (pr1
              (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v))
                 (pr12 (dob d v)) (pr22 (dob d v)))))%cat
          (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) (pr2 L)
             (pr1 (coconeIn cc v)) f))
· pr21 (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) (pr2 L)
          (pr1 (coconeIn cc v))
          (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L)) f)) =
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
   let dobvLvinFinf :=
     (# (pr1 (dob d v)))%cat LvinFinf in
   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· ((let Dv := dob dbase v in
    pr1
      (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
         (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
            (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
               (project_cocone L cc)) f)))
   · coconeIn
       (cocone_pointwise dbase (pr1 L)
          (project_cocone L cc)
          (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L)) f))
       v)

cc: cocone d L
f: arrow C

pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (pr2 (dob d v))) f)
· (pr21 ((# (pr1
               (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v))
                  (pr12 (dob d v)) (pr22 (dob d v)))))%cat
           (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) (pr2 L)

· (let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
   let LvinFinf :=
     three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
   let dobvLvinFinf :=

   three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)

    pr1

            (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
               (project_cocone L cc)) f)))
   · coconeIn

          (project_cocone L cc)

       v)

CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))

v0: vertex g

dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)

· (pr21 ((# (pr1
               (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v))
                  (pr12 (dob d v)) 
                  (pr22 (dob d v)))))%cat
           (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) 
              (pr2 L) (pr1 (coconeIn cc v)) f))
   · pr21 (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) 
             (pr2 L) (pr1 (coconeIn cc v))
             (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L))

L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
pr2 (pr1 (LNWFS_diagram_pointwise_comul_mor f) v)
· ((let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
    let LvinFinf :=
      three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
    let dobvLvinFinf :=
      (# (pr1 (dob d v)))%cat LvinFinf in
    three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
   · ((let Dv := dob dbase v in
       pr1
         (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
            (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
               (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
                  (project_cocone L cc)) f)))
      · coconeIn
          (cocone_pointwise dbase (pr1 L)
             (project_cocone L cc)
             (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L))
                f)) v)) =
pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (pr2 (dob d v))) f)
· (pr21 ((# (pr1
               (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v))
                  (pr12 (dob d v)) (pr22 (dob d v)))))%cat
           (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) (pr2 L)
              (pr1 (coconeIn cc v)) f))
   · pr21 (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) (pr2 L)
             (pr1 (coconeIn cc v))
             (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L))
                f)))

      
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
(let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
 let LvinFinf :=
   three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
 let dobvLvinFinf := (# (pr1 (dob d v)))%cat LvinFinf
   in
 three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· ((let Dv := dob dbase v in
    pr1
      (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
         (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
            (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
               (project_cocone L cc)) f)))
   · coconeIn
       (cocone_pointwise dbase (pr1 L)
          (project_cocone L cc)
          (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L)) f))
       v) =
pr21 ((# (pr1
            (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) (pr12 (dob d v))
               (pr22 (dob d v)))))%cat
        (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) (pr2 L)
           (pr1 (coconeIn cc v)) f))
· pr21 (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) (pr2 L)
          (pr1 (coconeIn cc v))
          (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L)) f))


      
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
(let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
 let LvinFinf :=
   three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
 let dobvLvinFinf := (# (pr1 (dob d v)))%cat LvinFinf
   in
 three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· ((let Dv := dob dbase v in
    pr1
      (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
         (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
            (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
               (project_cocone L cc)) f)))
   · coconeIn
       (cocone_pointwise dbase (pr1 L)
          (project_cocone L cc)
          (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L)) f))
       v) = ?b
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
?b =
pr21 ((# (pr1
            (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) 
               (pr12 (dob d v)) 
               (pr22 (dob d v)))))%cat
        (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) 
           (pr2 L) (pr1 (coconeIn cc v)) f))
· pr21 (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) 
          (pr2 L) (pr1 (coconeIn cc v))
          (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L)) f))
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
f: arrow C
v: vertex g
(let vinFinf := colimIn Finf v in
 let LvinFinf :=
   three_mor_mor01 (section_nat_trans vinFinf f) in
 let dobvLvinFinf := (# (pr1 (dob d v)))%cat LvinFinf
   in
 three_mor11 dobvLvinFinf)
· (let Dv := dob dbase v in
   pr1
     (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv
        (lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)
           (ColimFf_unique_mor CC dbase v0 (pr1 L)
              (project_cocone L cc)) f)))
· coconeIn
    (cocone_pointwise dbase (pr1 L)
       (project_cocone L cc)
       (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L)) f)) v =
pr21 ((# (pr1
            (L_monad (pr1 (dob d v)) (pr12 (dob d v))
               (pr22 (dob d v)))))%cat
        (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) (pr2 L)
           (pr1 (coconeIn cc v)) f))
· pr21 (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) (pr2 L)
          (pr1 (coconeIn cc v))
          (pr1 (L_monad (pr1 L) (pr12 L) (pr22 L)) f))

v: vertex g
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (dob dbase v)
     (pr1
        ((# (pr1 (dob d v)))%cat
           (three_mor_mor01
              (section_nat_trans (colimIn Finf v) f)))
      · lnwfs_mor ColimLNWFS_disp (pr2 L)

             (project_cocone L cc)) f)) =

               (pr22 (dob d v)))))%cat
        (lnwfs_mor (pr2 (dob d v)) (pr2 L)

  (cocone_pointwise dbase (pr1 L)

    exact (pr2 (pathsdirprodweq (base_paths _ _ (pr22 (coconeIn cc v) f)))).

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
∃! x : total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ ColimLNWFS, L ⟧,
∏ v : vertex g, ColimLNWFS_in v · x = coconeIn cc v

cc: cocone d L

∏ v : vertex g, ColimLNWFS_in v · x = coconeIn cc v

v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
Ff_unique:= ColimFf_unique CC dbase H 
  (pr1 L) (project_cocone L cc): ∃! x : Ff C ⟦ ColimFf CC dbase v0, pr1 L ⟧,
∏ v : vertex g,
colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H · x =
coconeIn (project_cocone L cc) v
∃! x : total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ ColimLNWFS, L ⟧,
∏ v : vertex g, ColimLNWFS_in v · x = coconeIn cc v

∏ v : vertex g,

g: graph

  (pr1 L) (project_cocone L cc): ∃! x : Ff C ⟦ ColimFf CC dbase v0, pr1 L ⟧,
∏ v : vertex g,

CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d

  (pr1 L) (project_cocone L cc): ∃! x : Ff C ⟦ ColimFf CC dbase v0, pr1 L ⟧,

∏ y : total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ ColimLNWFS, L ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ ColimLNWFS, L ⟧,
    ∏ v : vertex g,
    ColimLNWFS_in v · t = coconeIn cc v) y)

g: graph

  (pr1 L) (project_cocone L cc): ∃! x : Ff C ⟦ ColimFf CC dbase v0, pr1 L ⟧,

∏ y : total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ ColimLNWFS, L ⟧,
(λ t : total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ ColimLNWFS, L ⟧,
 ∏ v : vertex g, ColimLNWFS_in v · t = coconeIn cc v)
  y → y = ?x

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
Ff_unique:= ColimFf_unique CC dbase H 
  (pr1 L) (project_cocone L cc): ∃! x : Ff C ⟦ ColimFf CC dbase v0, pr1 L ⟧,
∏ v : vertex g,
colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H · x =
coconeIn (project_cocone L cc) v
pr2 ColimLNWFS -->[ pr1 (iscontrpr1 Ff_unique)] pr2 L

    exact (ColimLNWFS_disp_cc_mor cc).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
Ff_unique:= ColimFf_unique CC dbase H 
  (pr1 L) (project_cocone L cc): ∃! x : Ff C ⟦ ColimFf CC dbase v0, pr1 L ⟧,
∏ v : vertex g,
colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H · x =
coconeIn (project_cocone L cc) v
(λ t : total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ ColimLNWFS, L ⟧,
 ∏ v : vertex g, ColimLNWFS_in v · t = coconeIn cc v)
  (pr1 (iscontrpr1 Ff_unique),,
   ColimLNWFS_disp_cc_mor cc)
 abstract (
      intro v;
      apply subtypePath; [intro; apply isaprop_lnwfs_mor_axioms|];
      apply (pr2 (iscontrpr1 Ff_unique))
    ).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
Ff_unique:= ColimFf_unique CC dbase H 
  (pr1 L) (project_cocone L cc): ∃! x : Ff C ⟦ ColimFf CC dbase v0, pr1 L ⟧,
∏ v : vertex g,
colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H · x =
coconeIn (project_cocone L cc) v
∏ y : total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ ColimLNWFS, L ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ ColimLNWFS, L ⟧,
    ∏ v : vertex g,
    ColimLNWFS_in v · t = coconeIn cc v) y)
 abstract (
      intro y; apply impred; intro; apply homset_property
    ).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
cc: cocone d L
Ff_unique:= ColimFf_unique CC dbase H 
  (pr1 L) (project_cocone L cc): ∃! x : Ff C ⟦ ColimFf CC dbase v0, pr1 L ⟧,
∏ v : vertex g,
colim_nat_trans_in_data CC dbase H · x =
coconeIn (project_cocone L cc) v
∏ y : total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ ColimLNWFS, L ⟧,
(λ t : total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ ColimLNWFS, L ⟧,
 ∏ v : vertex g, ColimLNWFS_in v · t = coconeIn cc v)
  y
→ y =
  pr1 (iscontrpr1 Ff_unique),,
  ColimLNWFS_disp_cc_mor cc
 abstract (
      intros y ccy;
      destruct y as [Fy Ly];
      use total2_paths2_f; [|apply isaprop_lnwfs_mor_axioms];
      set (Ff_uniqueness := λ t, base_paths _ _ (iscontr_uniqueness Ff_unique t));
      use (Ff_uniqueness (Fy,, _));
      intro v;
      exact (base_paths _ _ (ccy v))
    ).
Defined.

CC: Colims C

d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
ColimCocone d

C: category

g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))

dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
LNWFS C (colim Finf)

    exact (ColimLNWFS_disp).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g

Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase

∏ v : vertex g,

colim Finf,, ColimLNWFS_disp ⟧

CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)

v: vertex g

C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
v: vertex g
pr2 (dob d v) -->[
colimIn Finf v] pr2 (colim Finf,, ColimLNWFS_disp)

      exact (ColimLNWFS_disp_in v).
    
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
forms_cocone d
  (λ v : vertex g,
   colimIn Finf v,, ColimLNWFS_disp_in v)
 abstract (
        intros u v e;
        apply subtypePath; [intro; apply isaprop_lnwfs_mor_axioms|];
        exact (colimInCommutes Finf _ _ e)
      ).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (total_category (LNWFS C))
H: is_connected g
v0: vertex g
FfCC:= λ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimFfCocone CC d H v0: ∏ d : diagram g (Ff C), ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: diagram g (Ff C)
Finf:= FfCC dbase: ColimCocone dbase
isColimCocone d (colim Finf,, ColimLNWFS_disp)
  (make_cocone
     (λ v : vertex g,
      colimIn Finf v,, ColimLNWFS_disp_in v)
     ColimLNWFSCocone_subproof)
 intros L cc; exact (ColimLNWFS_unique cc).
Defined.

End LNWFS_cocomplete.

Chains (total_category (LNWFS C))

d: chain (total_category (LNWFS C))

 exact is_connected_nat_graph.

d: chain (total_category (LNWFS C))
vertex nat_graph
 exact 0.
Defined.

Coequalizer (total_category (LNWFS C)) f g

 exact is_connected_coequalizer_graph.
  
C: category
HC: Colims C
F, G: total_category (LNWFS C)
f, g: total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ F, G ⟧
vertex Coequalizer_graph
 exact (● 0)%stn.
Defined.
